name: Susan Collins
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Thank you. During these difficult and uncertain times, I am especially grateful for all that you have done to support me in this fight. Raising money is one of the most difficult parts of this campaign, and I truly would not be able to do it without your help. I am going up against an unprecedented amount of money being funneled into Maine to falsely attack me and my record. Every dollar donated to my campaign has made an enormous difference in my ability to fight back against these attacks and set the record straight.

Peter,
_Thank you._
During these difficult and uncertain times, I am especially grateful for all that you have done to support me in this fight.
Raising money is one of the most difficult parts of this campaign, and I truly would not be able to do it without your help. I am going up against an unprecedented amount of money being funneled into Maine to falsely attack me and my record. Every dollar donated to my campaign has made an enormous difference in my ability to fight back against these attacks and set the record straight.
**But this fight is far from over,** and your continued support is more important than ever. It is only going to get more difficult from here. Thank you for your ongoing support.
All my best,
Susan Collins

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: six months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The only way we win against the GOP's millions is by building a grassroots team strong enough to take them on.
| | |
---
Friend, this is big: Experts from CNN to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight are now reporting that Democrats CAN take back the Senate this year - and election analysts say it will all come down to Georgia.
**But we have a major problem:** My Republican opponent - a former Wall Street exec who's been cashing in on her public office - is pouring $20 MILLION of her own fortune into this race to buy this seat. She just launched a massive TV ad blitz attacking Democrats and propping up her campaign. And it gets worse: POLITICO reports that Mitch McConnell is lining up "the full backing of the Republican establishment" to help my opponent win and tighten his grip on the Senate.
Friend, here's the deal: I don't have a giant personal war chest to fund my campaign, and I don't have an army of GOP megadonors ready to swoop in when the going gets tough. What I do have is grassroots supporters like you - people who believe in restoring moral leadership to Washington and are willing to fight tooth and nail to make the change they want to see in the world.
Right now we're in a dead heat with our Republican opponent - but if we don't pick up the grassroots momentum now and counter our opponent's ad blitz, we'll fall behind and lose this race.
**That 's why I set a goal to get 5,000 people to become Election Year Members by midnight tomorrow, and I'm personally asking you to be one of them: [_Will you give $5 or more now and become an Election Year Member of our people-powered campaign to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7f5/288179be/bbe7936/348e9be3/1489726947/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTk4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk198-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") The only way we win against the GOP's millions is by building a grassroots team strong enough to take them on.**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7f5/288179be/bbe7936/348e9be3/1489726947/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTk4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk198-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth - in fact, I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. If you'd told me that one day I'd earn a college degree, serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and run for U.S. Senate, I never would've believed you.
But the truth is, the opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are growing further and further out of reach for too many people across this country. It's unjust, and I'm running for Senate to change that. But I simply can't do it without you.
**[_We have a real shot at flipping Georgia blue, but it 's going to take all of us coming together in the next six months to make it happen. So please, friend: Give $5 or more - by tomorrow's midnight deadline - to become an Election Year Member in our fight to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to Washington! _](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7f5/288179be/bbe7936/348e9be3/1489726947/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTk4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk198-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7f5/288179be/bbe7936/348e9be3/1489726947/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTk4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk198-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Steve Chabot
subject: COVID-19 and Murder Hornets
body:
What really bugs me about COVID-19... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [COVID-19 and Murder Hornets](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-j/)
In my blog this week, I discuss how our lives have changed during this time of COVID-19 and to make matters worse, now we have to worry about an insect invasion! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [China Must be Held Accountable](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-d/)
To date, over 58,000 Americans have lost their lives due to the coronavirus pandemic. In this week's blog, I examine why communist China should be held accountable for the global devastation caused by this virus. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Reopen America Task Force](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-u/)
In this week's blog, I discuss why the Paycheck Protection Program ran out of cash, and the reason Democrats are holding up addition funds. I also write about President Trump's new task force and announced guidelines for reopening the economy and our country. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Turning 100 in the Time of the Coronavirus](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this time of the coronavirus, it seems that virtually every news story we see on TV, or read about in the newspapers, is concerning this deadly virus. And rightfully so. I've written about COVID-19 the last five weeks in this blog. Of course while the virus rages, most peoples' lives go on, and this week I wanted to focus on a small group of people among us - those who live for a century. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkljjryd-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Tony Gonzales
subject: You're hearing it first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress**
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
| | | Friend, Today was a pivotal day for Team Tony — we wouldn't be where we are now without your continued support and dedication to this campaign. Our team has some great news to share, _so I want you to be the first to know_. Check out our media release below about our most recent endorsement: ********** **For Immediate Release: **
May 6, 2020 **Media Contact:**
Matt Mackowiak
(512) 423-6116 _**Former Hurd Challenger Endorses Gonzales **_
_**in Coalescing of Support**_ _3rd Place Finisher Arredondo-Lynch Calls Gonzales “Best and Most Qualified” Candidate_ **SAN ANTONIO, TX** — Dr.**Alma Arredondo-Lynch** , a dentist and rancher from Uvalde County who finished third in the nine-way Republican primary for Texas’ congressional district 23 on March 3, is endorsing **Tony Gonzales** in the primary runoff. “During this election, I had the opportunity to campaign alongside Tony,” said Dr. **Alma Arredondo-Lynch**. “I can say without hesitation, in this runoff, he is the best and most qualified candidate to defeat the Democrats come November. I know Tony. I support him 100%. I want to urge all of my supporters to rally around his campaign and help him win this run-off election on July 14th.” Dr. Arredondo-Lynch won nearly 5,400 votes on March 3 and won nine of the district’s 29 counties, including her home county of Uvalde and many western counties. She challenged outgoing U.S. Rep. **Will Hurd** (R-TX) in 2018 in the primary and won over 6,000 votes. “I am honored to have the support of my friend Alma in this runoff,” said **Tony Gonzales**. “Alma ran a great campaign and she earned enthusiastic support from across the district. We look forward to working with her to decisively win this runoff and defeat liberal candidate Gina Jones in the November general election.” Learn more about Tony Gonzales and his campaign by visiting [TonyGonzalesForCongress.com.](https://tonygonzales.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkljiljk-olulttitiy-i/)
---
---

name: Corky Messner
subject: NEW AD! A true leader.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
We are in unprecedented times, and we need a true leader. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/bb9b4f3757b30e7fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, These are trying times, and more than ever, we need a solid leader in Washington, dedicated to helping all Granite Staters get through it. We have to retire D.C. Jeanne Shaheen, a career politician who toes the line of Nancy Pelosi and her cronies in Congress.

[**We've launched a new ad highlighting my leadership experience...**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/5b71da11ac5500b8c3d6b838967d376c/33153) from graduating from West Point, to earning my Ranger tab, and leading men in the fight against socialism as a U.S. Army Captain during the Cold War.

[**You can watch it here**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/4137427139cec001c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

I know New Hampshire needs a real leader right now. That's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate. But I need your help. We need to keep this ad on television and online to ensure voters across the Granite State see it.

Can you **[chip in $5 right now](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/11631504d2ac3207c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to show our fellow Granite Staters that there's an alternative to Jeanne Shaheen's swamp politics? For too long our state has had Jeanne Shaheen, who has wasted time and resources as an ineffective leader. She only cares about protecting her career, not helping the good, hard-working people of New Hampshire. It is vital that we get Jeanne Shaheen out of office, and keep our Senate majority. New Hampshire is a battleground state in 2020, and flipping this seat will go a long way towards ensuring every single citizen is free to pursue their dreams. We can’t afford to play political games in Washington anymore. Will you help me win this race by donating now? If you could [**chip in just $5**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/362f277853418bedc3d6b838967d376c/33153), it will help us reach more voters, and make sure we retire D.C. Jeanne in November. [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/3646cf205c4f97ccc3d6b838967d376c/33153) I am ready to serve Granite Staters and all Americans in Congress as a real leader, not a puppet of the far-left agenda. Will you help me get there? We’re going to get through this COVID-19 crisis. What our country looks like on the other side depends on our leaders in Congress. I promise to fight against socialism, and protect your God-given rights outlined in the Constitution. My West Point background, my military service, and my successful business career has given me all the training I need to lead us out of this pandemic. I will put people over politics, unlike Jeanne Shaheen. **It’s time for a change in New Hampshire**. **[It's time for a real leader to represent us in Washington!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/ee52331aa6497f8ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Thanks for your help,

Corky Messner [Keep us on the airwaves - Donate $5 NOW >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/d47cb996c43e3cd3c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/a583ddd540ea2085c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/aaf9ab9f34e1a689/f0a0bacca697bf18c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

body:
We've been reading each and every single entry that comes through, and we wanted to share some favorites.
#
Earlier this week, we asked you to share your story and tell us why you wanted to defeat Mitch McConnell.
Since then, hundreds of you have reached out to share your unique story and perspectives. We've been reading each and every single entry that comes through, and we wanted to share a few of our favorites below:

body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17407198/193252823/1521310305?refcode=em050720-header&refcode2=cb32030c-7490-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjMyMDMwYy03NDkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=baCVvKa_0mgSZxY6GHnPncnOGbhEbhqwUkLwla6q5VE=) **** | | The fundamental right to reproductive healthcare is under attack, friend. Just yesterday, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in two cases that could take away free birth control coverage for millions of women.

The Trump administration is arguing that employers should be allowed to claim religious exemption in order to deny women access to free birth control coverage in their insurance plans, which is mandated by the Affordable Care Act.

We know from Georgia’s unconstitutional abortion ban and David Perdue’s anti-choice legislation that the frontline of the fight for reproductive rights — and the Senate majority — is in Georgia.

**#VOTEPROCHOICE is a national organizing project that supports pro-choice champions, and today we are honored that Teresa has received their recommendation in this Senate race.**

This election will shape the future of the Supreme Court, as well as hundreds of federal judicial appointments in the next six years. We cannot allow six more years of David Perdue — and we certainly cannot allow six more years of Mitch McConnell running Washington’s legislative agenda.

[**Stand with #VOTEPROCHOICE and Teresa before our June 9 primary by chipping in today. Teresa is counting on your support to bring our fight for reproductive freedom to the floor of the United States Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17407199/193252824/1521310305?refcode=em050720-b&refcode2=cb32030c-7490-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjMyMDMwYy03NDkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=baCVvKa_0mgSZxY6GHnPncnOGbhEbhqwUkLwla6q5VE=) | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | The fundamental right to reproductive healthcare is under attack, friend. Just yesterday, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in two cases that could take away free birth control coverage for millions of women. The Trump administration is arguing that employers should be allowed to claim religious exemption in order to deny women access to free birth control coverage in their insurance plans, which is mandated by the Affordable Care Act. We know from Georgia’s unconstitutional abortion ban and David Perdue’s anti-choice legislation that the frontline of the fight for reproductive rights — and the Senate majority — is in Georgia. #VOTEPROCHOICE is a national organizing project that supports pro-choice champions, and today we are honored that Teresa has received their recommendation in this Senate race. This election will shape the future of the Supreme Court, as well as hundreds of federal judicial appointments in the next six years. We cannot allow six more years of David Perdue — and we certainly cannot allow six more years of Mitch McConnell running Washington’s legislative agenda. = | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = You are the backbone of our campaign — thank you for everything you are doing to support Teresa in this election. —Team Tomlinson PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Here's how we're going to reach 10,000 COVID-19 tests a day
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
One of the most important factors in thinking about whether it's safe to reopen is our testing capacity. We need to be confident that we can provide rapid, accurate, and widely available testing.
Rhode Island has been a leader in testing: We continue to have the highest rate of testing in the country. We were one of the first states to establish drive-through testing sites, one of the first states to deploy rapid testing machines, and the very first state to partner with CVS on a large-scale on-the-spot testing operation. Today, I want to tell you about how we're going to expand testing and ensure that it's safe to reopen Rhode Island.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tmzn9mNT0uDyYgUWFToyRfqdz9bS-UB9l89YFmdKaNw88LyvgFS9b6ubP-e_YGQ5ped-pBqyb0v0RRcgvG2ezXe6lBGytMxEfLXq264HZ78zkOjE_v-Be51mGC8NvIjRr4rzMgmeRzLH08DKqwRb9s8vAaTILgivbriaM9-Mx3ni9_HsuElnWaGC10DLWgx6mdsIDkDBbmU=&c=6h3tUEBMcLxQtJCnJ8EVj0j7bLxcdri7cXXwlBQldO1DltP_MQXkvw==&ch=s3eS6Q7jN6uQ7ukHusQdoHo6zwLLvJ-ltx0kt7Rr_Ln3YuR5jvOAdQ==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tmzn9mNT0uDyYgUWFToyRfqdz9bS-UB9l89YFmdKaNw88LyvgFS9b6ubP-e_YGQ5ped-pBqyb0v0RRcgvG2ezXe6lBGytMxEfLXq264HZ78zkOjE_v-Be51mGC8NvIjRr4rzMgmeRzLH08DKqwRb9s8vAaTILgivbriaM9-Mx3ni9_HsuElnWaGC10DLWgx6mdsIDkDBbmU=&c=6h3tUEBMcLxQtJCnJ8EVj0j7bLxcdri7cXXwlBQldO1DltP_MQXkvw==&ch=s3eS6Q7jN6uQ7ukHusQdoHo6zwLLvJ-ltx0kt7Rr_Ln3YuR5jvOAdQ==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| By July, we're planning to be able to test 10k people every day. That means every day, we'd be able to test 1% of our entire state's population. We're going to achieve this goal of 10K tests a day with a comprehensive state testing strategy:
1. Ensuring rapid testing of all symptomatic people. That means you should be able to schedule a test and get the results within two days. We're close to that goal and working to speed up the process.
2. Reacting quickly to an outbreak. Our plan calls for an outbreak response team on the ground within four hours of multiple cases discovered in places like congregate care settings, workplaces, and other high-density areas. This team will also conduct rapid testing of any contacts who may have been exposed.
3. Creating an early warning system by testing groups of asymptomatic individuals. We know that this virus spreads rapidly in groups and congregate living situations are problematic, so we need to be able to test comprehensively in these high-risk settings. We're going to do cyclical testing for other high-risk populations, such as healthcare workers and first responders. We're also going to work with schools, universities, and private sector partners to set up early warning testing for their own populations. And we'll continue to do random sampling to get a better sense of how far this virus has spread in our community.

---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tmzn9mNT0uDyYgUWFToyRfqdz9bS-UB9l89YFmdKaNw88LyvgFS9b5dutnj2FCAYlRZaAdVND7JG9enqQTIfq8iUW_q9bqRFrAMweNCkmzIRNXSyXch8r_DE6H_gSR5AQkDCRY-YPl1G9eBbGQqqw3oS1TY8i5zkMfNjsFNhSN0xm3oLQxLA6a1WpSLvbFCrELfszxw7JAuCiQ4dJP28ZsPQlm_jwOaTJx8vCO-xo57UIQHqAlMwyA==&c=6h3tUEBMcLxQtJCnJ8EVj0j7bLxcdri7cXXwlBQldO1DltP_MQXkvw==&ch=s3eS6Q7jN6uQ7ukHusQdoHo6zwLLvJ-ltx0kt7Rr_Ln3YuR5jvOAdQ==)
---
| None of this will be easy, but I'm confident in our ability to execute for Rhode Island. I am confident that we are well-equipped -- and better equipped than virtually every other state -- to begin reopening our economy.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tmzn9mNT0uDyYgUWFToyRfqdz9bS-UB9l89YFmdKaNw88LyvgFS9b5dutnj2FCAY-xjAFoJsjp_hv6w20jm25U8yCeqTOOnJjAeKL37nsZTgkzwoFhcYu91DH5s5aql1t-BdDxJrpbExP1mMUsrNeW1Zc-Hzt2E7QXBG-sgHHv5jmvbRnO0XZqYPg0ePDBn6e5AeN0gA0nx1YvXgkvs-8_bthh_bGEYLBBVJWbJWE0wkgqcNzbn2fR_lS7RokMVE1Tywf2-N7MC338xN1UItpLUbuN3kvsP4_I_2ad_-FUxrj6Wdi21ydUd4sln2wH9Qphw7P2gxd0A=&c=6h3tUEBMcLxQtJCnJ8EVj0j7bLxcdri7cXXwlBQldO1DltP_MQXkvw==&ch=s3eS6Q7jN6uQ7ukHusQdoHo6zwLLvJ-ltx0kt7Rr_Ln3YuR5jvOAdQ==).
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Re: USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — The United States Postal Service is an essential public service and a critical lifeline for millions of Americans — delivering wages and voting ballots, connecting people to important resources, and providing thousands of jobs. **We must protect it.** But without emergency funding, the postal service is at risk of running out of money by June as the economic impact of the coronavirus continues to take its toll. Shortly after, it could collapse. **[Donald Trump is still refusing to provide much-needed relief to keep our post offices operational — even during this pandemic. Will you sign our petition to demand emergency relief to save the USPS? This fight is too important for partisan games.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17407975/193270605/816590491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzQyOTkzMy03YTkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wm3PiRGhQWAb8aqtFF--gdkqHmtL6yO5T8qluvlg4VU=&emci=1b429933-7a90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1c429933-7a90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17407976/193270606/816590491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzQyOTkzMy03YTkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wm3PiRGhQWAb8aqtFF--gdkqHmtL6yO5T8qluvlg4VU=&emci=1b429933-7a90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1c429933-7a90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)

name: John Cornyn
subject: Red Texas Defender
body:
Friend, In the past days, weeks, and even months, I've noticed your unfailing commitment and efforts to ensure that we Keep Texas Red in November. I don't think I have to tell you twice. Keeping Texas Red in November means next to everything. That means: Capitalism, protecting Second Amendment Rights, ending illegal immigration, and defending conservative values. Friend, you're fighting for our values, and I know you won't give up until the battle is done and we come out victorious on election day. Because of all of this, I wanted to institute a new program with you, Friend, in mind. **[I've recommended to my team that you be nominated to join our new select group of supporters: the Red Texas Defenders.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jXA9fRm-5AO1ktIEgqWCl9msCR1WU2n5oKlr53okduFlIrnJiITk7F9vlnDjyMEUEFQ6pMemvVGiFzKaCKyFMXbsFMMo-Q-ITaH0fJrB50ohFtV3BzppLBUeE5JlzfDm3dpVQOuf9ivXF_igmkM2Ub2tr8hlqapFCJmvgouVxqGDAKBVDkplT28hMgRjrz2F4618MS-gKfGPEnRE7M5cCIC4r-jLf9ZsfDbbdDM0FjcqUUiutaf3-T-fGcYITbUwJxaE89r50LP8HyBSbWRLizvvpkojDKJWD8FQcx8fqWBb7bDqNrLInK4Qyd1Lxvywu-IgPvxhbLIAfr6nM-ccqfeXhSevbePgZobUkIYyV6yESIANW8EBtQ==&c=fjrRBY0ZPc2ZlUhJ-HfaCNGKcOMApQzIQI0vwFbVDx_TQ5KPf-lYdg==&ch=ZtHB2JoXjJoX4pvBCMLmcORl3m83JSIQgBLnJY2XxigjS0_6Naigfw==)** **Red Texas Defender** Status: **PENDING
** [ **BECOME A RED TEXAS DEFENDER** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jXA9fRm-5AO1ktIEgqWCl9msCR1WU2n5oKlr53okduFlIrnJiITk7F9vlnDjyMEUEFQ6pMemvVGiFzKaCKyFMXbsFMMo-Q-ITaH0fJrB50ohFtV3BzppLBUeE5JlzfDm3dpVQOuf9ivXF_igmkM2Ub2tr8hlqapFCJmvgouVxqGDAKBVDkplT28hMgRjrz2F4618MS-gKfGPEnRE7M5cCIC4r-jLf9ZsfDbbdDM0FjcqUUiutaf3-T-fGcYITbUwJxaE89r50LP8HyBSbWRLizvvpkojDKJWD8FQcx8fqWBb7bDqNrLInK4Qyd1Lxvywu-IgPvxhbLIAfr6nM-ccqfeXhSevbePgZobUkIYyV6zXJViBtrRS-Q==&c=fjrRBY0ZPc2ZlUhJ-HfaCNGKcOMApQzIQI0vwFbVDx_TQ5KPf-lYdg==&ch=ZtHB2JoXjJoX4pvBCMLmcORl3m83JSIQgBLnJY2XxigjS0_6Naigfw==) This group isn't for the faint of heart. This group is exclusively for Texans who have defended Texas and will continue to do so, even past November. **[Friend, will you answer the call? Do you want to be recognized as a Red Texas Defender?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jXA9fRm-5AO1ktIEgqWCl9msCR1WU2n5oKlr53okduFlIrnJiITk7F9vlnDjyMEUEFQ6pMemvVGiFzKaCKyFMXbsFMMo-Q-ITaH0fJrB50ohFtV3BzppLBUeE5JlzfDm3dpVQOuf9ivXF_igmkM2Ub2tr8hlqapFCJmvgouVxqGDAKBVDkplT28hMgRjrz2F4618MS-gKfGPEnRE7M5cCIC4r-jLf9ZsfDbbdDM0FjcqUUiutaf3-T-fGcYITbUwJxaE89r50LP8HyBSbWRLizvvpkojDKJWD8FQcx8fqWBb7bDqNrLInK4Qyd1Lxvywu-IgPvxhbLIAfr6nM-ccqfeXhSevbePgZobUkIYyV6zi2lnSc-FelQ==&c=fjrRBY0ZPc2ZlUhJ-HfaCNGKcOMApQzIQI0vwFbVDx_TQ5KPf-lYdg==&ch=ZtHB2JoXjJoX4pvBCMLmcORl3m83JSIQgBLnJY2XxigjS0_6Naigfw==)** Again, this is for THE select few who have answered the call and are committed to doing so. Those who are committed to not allowing: \- The Green New Deal \- Socialism \- Open Borders \- And Gun Bans Friend, if this sounds like you, you must act quick. This group is only open for a limited amount of time. Will you respond? John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, were one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, were glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jXA9fRm-5AO1ktIEgqWCl9msCR1WU2n5oKlr53okduFlIrnJiITk7K7Wab75NmRzsouSQTdVnHUbF_cKDmpvgFqw2x82KB6r46GCktTdqpK2ssuERYdqSvnofhYS_1AYGdE3xlo1y5o0DvxKBIiIwq1Bal5uB_Ihn2_p23gglGI=&c=fjrRBY0ZPc2ZlUhJ-HfaCNGKcOMApQzIQI0vwFbVDx_TQ5KPf-lYdg==&ch=ZtHB2JoXjJoX4pvBCMLmcORl3m83JSIQgBLnJY2XxigjS0_6Naigfw==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jXA9fRm-5AO1ktIEgqWCl9msCR1WU2n5oKlr53okduFlIrnJiITk7AQZAVkwFXPVhAI9kpIcUpBYY5GaeSs72BvyBK9xDUmm-0bjyfbmRjtRAF-qHzdNWzbuJa-L_bhRIaOaIBB75bmW3A9B7yL8ANaYfFrMkh3x&c=fjrRBY0ZPc2ZlUhJ-HfaCNGKcOMApQzIQI0vwFbVDx_TQ5KPf-lYdg==&ch=ZtHB2JoXjJoX4pvBCMLmcORl3m83JSIQgBLnJY2XxigjS0_6Naigfw==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jXA9fRm-5AO1ktIEgqWCl9msCR1WU2n5oKlr53okduFlIrnJiITk7K7Wab75NmRzDeolkBF8FU7Lz7GKA1__YEO3_qRiuA_5pa_aDeleacX7aj5HFUfbBBuaJjDSU8WQiE6FJV5kxEEMCxWdSyfuW48Ba4gefwf-5fBJkrZNizDpx4r3d09Y5g==&c=fjrRBY0ZPc2ZlUhJ-HfaCNGKcOMApQzIQI0vwFbVDx_TQ5KPf-lYdg==&ch=ZtHB2JoXjJoX4pvBCMLmcORl3m83JSIQgBLnJY2XxigjS0_6Naigfw==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jXA9fRm-5AO1ktIEgqWCl9msCR1WU2n5oKlr53okduFlIrnJiITk7NO3Rq39XD0xEu4BsblP7ZmtCHKzDmdC9sffNQx2np86u17gnEIsQN79DzCc61uihuRBQKEo3SHN-KAgqzQCAqOdBc1nJG-MPYdUb0dM1WIeueFwCbOgkeWjNVg0poXtOoOh_BR5ghlTiJvU49o4sBB-6YYJc9bzojdNnw8RNy-6a7D3xb9jeBxnzkTBeIkD0TsaebvSXjjXPZODIFGrBOk0DDfI1AWa6FKWsUOdD_v0YMo-wZ9IVqZn-aE4yuZUKQ==&c=fjrRBY0ZPc2ZlUhJ-HfaCNGKcOMApQzIQI0vwFbVDx_TQ5KPf-lYdg==&ch=ZtHB2JoXjJoX4pvBCMLmcORl3m83JSIQgBLnJY2XxigjS0_6Naigfw==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

**_THE WASHINGTON POST_ : A DEMOCRATIC WIN IN GEORGIA KEY TO ENDING MCCONNELL'S SENATE MAJORITY**
Friend: Right now, polling shows Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) and unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R) NECK and NECK - in a race that analysts at _The Washington Post_ say is key to deciding Senate control!
That's why Mitch McConnell is lining up the FULL backing of the Republican establishment to support his handpicked candidate, and why Loeffler is flooding this race with $20 MILLION of her own fortune. It's obvious: **The GOP is PANICKING.**
While Loeffler is desperate to buy this seat outright, Reverend Warnock is working to earn the trust and support of everyday Georgians, and he's doing it with a people-powered campaign behind him.
We have a historic opportunity to elect Reverend Warnock as Georgia's first black senator, flip this seat and end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all - but ONLY if people like you step up and help us build _the strongest grassroots team possible._
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can win in Georgia and take back the Senate, but we can't do it alone. With time running out, we're still falling 1,382 Election Year Members short of our goal and need you to rush your immediate grassroots support to get back on track: **

| Derek Our campaign announced another HUGE endorsement today, **Congressman Pete King**! As the former Chairman of the US House Committee on Homeland Security, Congressman King is **one of our nation's foremost experts on National Defense, Intelligence and Homeland Security**. His no-nonsense, America-first approach is exactly the type of attitude that I hope to bring down to Washington if I am elected. Will you join Congressman Pete King on Team Mayberry for Congress and [make a small $15, $25 or even $100 contribution](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDE1OTUwNzM0NzI5NDE4MDMxJmM9ZjRpMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDU1NzQyNzgmZD13MmgxYjhi.TSiNVjsSPJwgQSBOxhbn-nMfH_nzVsSL59KU0EgTZ4I) to help us win back a Republican majority in Congress? Check out Congressman King's endorsement video below:

| |
---
| Thank you for your support! \- Matt

| “I am proud to endorse Matt Mayberry for US Congress. I have known Matt for years, he is a true Granite Stater and the best candidate to help us win back a Republican Majority in Congress. Matt Mayberry is exactly the kind of person that we need down in Washington to help drain the Swamp.” \- Congressman Pete King (NY-02)

This election will be CLOSE, team -- within a field margin.
But let's talk about what it means when a race is within a "field margin." It means that it'll be decided by a few percentage points, and the work we do on the ground to talk to voters will be the difference.
**Let 's (virtually!) lace up our boots and do some good old-fashioned organizing. [Add a donation today to invest in our brand-new field strategy.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b42c/388db0e9/8caab12/609b9d41/2020380081/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUwN19maWVsZDFfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_may?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200507_field1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Add+a+donation+today+to+invest+in+our+br&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200507_field1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200507_field1_U1_X1")**

That's why I'm asking: "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" This election will be CLOSE, team -- within a field margin. But let's talk about what it means when a race is within a "field margin." It means that it'll be decided by a few percentage points, and the work we do on the ground to talk to voters will be the difference. Let 's (virtually!) lace up our boots and do some good old-fashioned organizing. "" Thanks, Francis | "" | If you'd like to support Conole for Congress, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | Paid for by Conole for Congress Conole for Congress PO Box: 851 Syracuse, NY 13201 mailto:info@conoleforcongress.com "" "" tel:+13152808751

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Announcing the Flip the Senate Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Getting work done requires flipping the Senate.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ac/7f51f7bc/4f8c2e28/4ef15149/3741285858/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ac/7f51f7bc/4f8c2e28/4ef15148/3741285858/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-flipthesenate?refcode=email_20200507.1nd_a__1361__&amount=10")
---
Hi Peter,

It's time to flip the Senate and elect a leader who'll fight for Texans. But to do it, I need your help.
**Here 's why I'm putting together the Flip the Senate Fund:**
* **We 've got to protect people with pre-existing conditions**
* **We 've got to lower drug prices**
* **We 've got to take action on climate change**
* **We 've got to enact gun safety laws**
* **Sen. Cornyn isn 't doing his job to serve the PEOPLE of Texas -- he's focused on wealthy special interest donors**

---
So long as the Senate is run by Mitch McConnell and Sen. John Cornyn, we'll only see legislation that their corporate PACs want to reach the floor. They're out there to help themselves and their donors, not you, and they've been rewarded with overflowing war chests.

**[I'm doing things differently, which is why I need your help. Will you donate $5 today to our Flip the Senate Fund and help elect a leader who'll fight for all Texans?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ac/7f51f7bc/4f8c2e28/4ef1514f/3741285858/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-flipthesenate?refcode=email_20200507.1nd_a__1361__&amount=5")**

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ac/7f51f7bc/4f8c2e28/4ef15148/3741285858/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-flipthesenate?refcode=email_20200507.1nd_a__1361__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ac/7f51f7bc/4f8c2e28/4ef1514e/3741285858/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1361&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ac/7f51f7bc/4f8c2e28/4ef1514d/3741285858/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

body:
Margaret knows that one of the most critical parts of being a successful legislator is the ability to step back and listen to the people she serves: her constituents and her community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17411369/193331601/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjRjNmY1OS05MTkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQK4oHBDPKjeU55iZp9XZdpDBbc2WF-UZsW6kT0_iJ0=&emci=af7b97e6-8b90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=864c6f59-9190-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

Margaret knows that one of the most critical parts of being a successful legislator is the ability to step back and listen to the people she serves: her constituents and her community.

It's important as she continues to work to flip Florida’s 16th Congressional District that she understands what issues you and your family care most about.

The issues that so many people in our community care about — clean water, good schools, and access to health care — will continue to be the foundation of Margaret's campaign.

And as we continue to focus on grassroots change and building this movement, we need to know what issues you and your family prioritize. It is helpful for us to learn your stories and hear your ideas for change. Thank you for being part of our work.

**[It will only take a few minutes of your time, and we'll report back on the results next week.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17411370/193331602/-1201311120?contactdata=WDHRvLMHG%2FM81xx2LDfaBq1hgS4LksZ4lLkMuQyYw6O8ydea1HjJkFSpNgfbro7YqoYbZ%2F0lN3UGJyT4zzp8XR5kjeScIHH7zdbq1SHlVG00GI%2BoMDK7b6%2BSBkNM45IJQezEluvTHg6CNNULHxRJdg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjRjNmY1OS05MTkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQK4oHBDPKjeU55iZp9XZdpDBbc2WF-UZsW6kT0_iJ0=&emci=af7b97e6-8b90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=864c6f59-9190-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: The good, the bad, the ugly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

With under a week to go and national attention turning towards our race, we've got some good, some bad, and some ugly news.

**The Good:** Up until now, we were neck and neck with Garcia on the airwaves.

**The Bad:** Donald Trump and his online army of supporters are dumping money in Garcia's campaign war chest, and he just placed a massive $292,084 TV buy.

**The Ugly:** With Garcia's new buy, total spending on his behalf is up to a jaw-dropping $2.7 million -- with more expected to come through. And right now, we're not prepared to match Garcia's spending, not with Trump raising all this money on his behalf.

**[If we're going to overcome Trump's tidal wave of support, we need to hit our $1 million goal and unleash a wave of digital activism of our own. Can you chip in $5 or more to help do it?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e52/4141742840/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e53/4141742840/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e2c/4141742840/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e2d/4141742840/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e2e/4141742840/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e2f/4141742840/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e52/4141742840/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non")
This goal is steep, but it's what we need to defend this seat and protect our majority in the House. Luckily, Team Christy has grown a lot since we announced our goal.

Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton, Elizabeth Warren, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, Amy Klobuchar, and so many more have joined our race against Donald Trump and Mike Garcia.

**That's because this race is so important to our majority and the wellbeing of our nation.**

**[If you can, chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to hit our goal and defend this battleground district.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e52/4141742840/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non")**

Thank you,

Brandon

Brandon Zavala
Campaign Manager, Christy for Congress
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb01/29776869/a704aeb/569f0e52/4141742840/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LW5vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal9-non")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

subject: New TV Ad: Murderous Communist Thugs Covered-Up Coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
‘Diplomats’ Like Kulkarni No Longer Allowed To Remain Silent Against Communist China | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e79e4f51d7ce/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12453309?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Thursday, May 7, 2020
---
| | **Pro-Trump Conservative Kathaleen Wall Launches New TV Ad Aiming to Hold Chinese Communist Party Accountable **
_Sugar Land Republican Says: “The Days Of So-Called ‘Diplomats’ Like Sri Preston Kulkarni Being Allowed To Remain Silent Against Communist China Are Over. The Murderous Thugs At The CCP Knew About The Coronavirus And Covered It Up, All While Stifling Dissent And Persecuting Christians. We Must Bring Back Our Supply Chains, And The CCP Must Be Held Accountable.”_

**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today launched her second districtwide television ad targeting the Chinese Communist Party for knowingly covering up the Coronavirus, and Wall also took aim at the Chinese government’s dictatorship for stifling dissent and persecuting Christians.

Wall didn’t pull any punches aimed at the CCP or spineless, silent Democrats who refuse to stand up to the thuggish Chinese government, like Sri Preston Kulkarni.

“The days of so-called ‘diplomats’ like Sri Preston Kulkarni being allowed to remain silent against Communist China are over. The murderous thugs at the CCP knew about the Coronavirus and covered it up, all while stifling dissent and persecuting Christians,” said Wall. “We must bring back our supply chains, and the CCP must be held accountable.”
The new Wall campaign ad, entitled “Arrest,” began running today on Fox News district-wide and will soon be on broadcast television in advance of the July 14th primary runoff election. Below please find the ad transcript, and the ad can be viewed here:
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=af09e75cbc&e=01c99b7fbd)
**Voiceover: **The Communist Chinese government stifles dissent.

Persecutes Christians.

And lies about the Coronavirus.

Pro-Trump Republican Kathaleen Wall’s position is clear.

Our constitution is supreme.

Our faith is our core.

And we will make China pay.

Kathaleen Wall supports President Trump immediately bringing back critical manufacturing like medicine and medical supplies.

And holding the Chinese Communist Party accountable.

For Congress, it’s Kathaleen Wall against Communist China.

**Kathaleen Wall:** I’m Kathaleen Wall and I approve this message.

###
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=761fd45da5&e=01c99b7fbd)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: A Victory for Campus Justice
body:
"On Wednesday, the Education Department brought Americans a step closer to having [[sexual misconduct] allegations tried more thoroughly and fairly..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65ae34d9b0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **A Victory for Campus Justice**

“On Wednesday, the Education Department brought Americans a step closer to having [sexual misconduct] allegations tried more thoroughly and fairly—at least on college campuses,” Robert Shibley writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“Institutions will finally have to guarantee due process for students caught up in campus kangaroo courts . . . More than 40% of top colleges don’t even specify that their equivalents of judges and juries must be impartial. This madness will end when the rules take effect.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b655e122d2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “China’s government engaged in an ‘assault on international transparency’ to the ‘endangerment of other countries,’ concludes a report by the Five Eyes intelligence consortium of the United Kingdom, Canada, Australia, New Zealand and the United States. In other words, it’s not just the Trump administration making that case, as much of the US media would have you believe,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d175ad09a&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “For the first time in history, all 50 states, five territories and the District of Columbia are under a major disaster declaration at the same time. This is unprecedented, but the COVID-19 outbreak is in many ways an unprecedented emergency, and it calls for an unprecedented response,” Rear Adm. John Polowczyk writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=936a7f891f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The Voice of America's Persian news network was once a powerful tool in Washington’s efforts to shape public opinion in Iran. Now, it is arguably the least-watched of the Persian-language channels available to Iranians seeking an alternative to regime propaganda. The story of VOA Persian’s decline is not one of stagnation but of self-destruction,” Alireza Nadar writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b1d6a7a47e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bbf98727e7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17bf686fde&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2c3d2ac516)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: CoryBooker.com
subject: Sign the petition: Condemn Donald Trump for pulling WHO funding during the COVID-19 crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Team -- Donald Trump has repeatedly downplayed the severity of the coronavirus crisis believing it's in the best interest for his re-election campaign. He's even taken extreme measures to make his point, like cutting funding for the World Health Organization -- the very organization responsible for coordinating the global response to the COVID-19 pandemic. [**It 's dangerous and irresponsible. Add your name today if you agree: Donald Trump's decision to pull WHO funding during the COVID-19 crisis should be condemned.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-petition-who-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-petition-who-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
As a member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, Cory is leading the effort in the Senate to require the U.S. to pay its full dues to the WHO and other international organizations in which our country is a member.
To combat this health crisis, we should be supporting scientific research, data, and facts -- not undermining the institution tasked with bringing together world leaders to defeat this virus.
We need to send a strong message to Donald Trump condemning his partisan decision to pull funding for the WHO in the midst of a health crisis.
[**If you 're with us, add your name today.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-petition-who-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
[SIGN THE PETITION ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-petition-who-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
Team Booker

subject: Now open: expanded statewide testing

focused first on Hoosiers’ health | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1adc5db88dbc428c8b22bde9a519516e&_e=2J9IxxUT1h_Y69skwXpJt1TTaKB9ba0cpslHageHDcp__aW1sgLx-5WNQE_DVIH7g9o-otAZjtLG1m-I3r_fhSEjUSdH3WdbNd3SBQlqTtir7T1s0gGaV38WxRAVp99dY3kUswqWoPK2wvkoPIy89nTZkGYVu3b53z1vy0kV2Rv0Pi39conqXi0D9EelUzgwvdo7zFr73WNI2StJoSHvjrfyhxhh7eBEEukoeoA_6rUOtFfWVojKggXd63euvRQEt2I__ynAklB64AHwry6Xgo_h_S5oF57e8ecb_K9Q148pted5s_XwZT7DCC2vPSJWc7kLj_YH9zZ44tR7hSt1H1RXeKowg5xvnRhZYnzX3lpcdino7JFrF8Jj80-IbLfwOf93PFaNJIVm7XFSoLfL2g%3D%3D) |
---|---|---

Friends,

Last week when Governor Holcomb unveiled his **[Back on Track plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1adc5db88dbc428c8b22bde9a519516e&_e=2J9IxxUT1h_Y69skwXpJt2PouyqNEF7jRQflWoWBgWkUxTQr-2YEIhREEaiK0Uyu5mDwKUYmsPnmUwnnWzuOJEsVsgXHlEw0DKt-A6U19n5PFn3NttdzIvGyurnQtJXJL8AjHO9UxtTO7WzlolDKiKtRkNGgsa2wx4HCvCFYZLb-nZijSGXelYoe5Exp4wIeuaXj1YVdFESIe5vc-oMtvf8_pgNlWUcIHdRHHEyKX8vVEubIRSx3zSjNUQKKskBAlP1LZUlkuA9Y8HPOpgulS2T_Rge34QleY2KvYPq0JKqIvL9bm1LyWQe76XVzi4Tv7TapfM79RXmZERu9kej-PrpHupU8ZvLUR6viJ1PN8AVsqt_cpvLG9iW8o_cZ9id2)** , he laid out a phased plan for reopening Indiana over the next two months. _**It’s data-driven, it’s comprehensive, and it’s focused first on Hoosiers’ health.**_

And, as Governor Holcomb said, along the way he’ll be looking at four guiding principles daily to make sure we’re _**safely**_ getting back on track –

1. The number of hospitalized COVID-19 patients statewide has decreased for 14 days.
2. The state maintains its surge capacity for critical care beds and ventilators.
3. We can test all Hoosiers who are COVID-19 symptomatic.
4. We can contact all individuals who test positive for COVID-19 and expand contact tracing.

Yesterday was a big day for guiding principle #3. That’s because Indiana’s _**large-scale, statewide, drive-through testing program is now open!**_

If you or someone you know is showing symptoms of COVID-19 (or has been in close contact to someone who has tested positive), _**we’d encourage you to schedule an appointment for a free test by visiting[lhi.care/covidtesting](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1adc5db88dbc428c8b22bde9a519516e&_e=2J9IxxUT1h_Y69skwXpJtz-tMZs7kTmKHIpYeEkjhoLsy1SFeNzgHsvtnJmjwnDXxioCFki27TlrwovwVWcSG6LHQBOHGqZqY79ZrOKCHZ4OgOs5KkG1JA09ELXv2BdQTgaUZP0huz-SVJC7PyexbqoBzNJLe-C43yqMiAWAoa2uFa7xfHvYBJVnNExDu38wm1bBdwqbpFHdZKTwyOg9ZZdtS3E3JpokuOS_16QiIa49f9bc5DFFhaq74H2RNfhRLRUg0qeXBc8UbQmQbcIhBz5S82BRRxEpsQKLsqPSrQjeGZwD5HPtL8yOIivzFLUqVVr96214QfCROr_zh9HImI-Fz2hqLDZcPx__7Wywk10AZxLY0OwwIdgGUFf4Ogwr) or calling 888-634-1116.**_

This free, statewide program is now up-and-running with 20 sites, with 30 additional sites expected to open in the next week. This adds 30,000 more COVID-19 tests a week to Indiana’s statewide testing capacity!

And with drive-through clinics, hospitals, local health departments and other community-based sites also testing, _**there are now more than 120 COVID-19 testing locations throughout the entire state.**_
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1adc5db88dbc428c8b22bde9a519516e&_e=2J9IxxUT1h_Y69skwXpJt1TTaKB9ba0cpslHageHDcp__aW1sgLx-5WNQE_DVIH7g9o-otAZjtLG1m-I3r_fhSEjUSdH3WdbNd3SBQlqTtir7T1s0gGaV38WxRAVp99dY3kUswqWoPK2wvkoPIy89nTZkGYVu3b53z1vy0kV2Rv0Pi39conqXi0D9EelUzgw5dx2wKFE_-giohYQvTxdHB_lcdp__MJ_XYk4Lu8BtVsbIqVAM3zdrKxIt6bvYrvwVf_btdoDKcaNl192Q_K2sL9Dvq1Sssr0eF6cQoWs4NjWmE6V-DS5OhlY98A3Ud5cjgexbCNHUALr6Fc439Z5zGsWrcWJ6SW4a0BeGqXqNPuNOsJoiEDRPBesrlU8cqkKWM-rkTU2Fd5x9t-ulixglQ%3D%3D)
[ COVID-19 Testing: Find a Testing Site Near You ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1adc5db88dbc428c8b22bde9a519516e&_e=2J9IxxUT1h_Y69skwXpJt1TTaKB9ba0cpslHageHDcp__aW1sgLx-5WNQE_DVIH7g9o-otAZjtLG1m-I3r_fhSEjUSdH3WdbNd3SBQlqTtir7T1s0gGaV38WxRAVp99dY3kUswqWoPK2wvkoPIy89nTZkGYVu3b53z1vy0kV2Rv0Pi39conqXi0D9EelUzgwgHO1Vgh48v4dvfODCERHhlp-ZrdjdsTl_LjT6HDoDTer0PBfWbdg7QfPDBJ9tkxwARYro6qfAhTQccbqfvN8Ax4JMmLx1K3W992xSrLb4ZcXIRijr1cb3tFg_u5gq14Bte4S6DCAKnOeiXCA-wny63R7Yy7c_knP9dssFOJI1YS9G35MKgHYKhnM-aYDMiMRfawRLpPpnHVoQ21tvO_X-Q%3D%3D)
And it’s that testing that will help Hoosiers get back to their daily lives – and helps make Indiana’s Back on Track plan work.

Together, let’s all continue to work hard, and if you feel symptoms, please schedule an appointment at one of Indiana’s many testing sites.

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: Senator Joni Ernst
subject: Here’s how you can save the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Colorado's Senate seat is right next to Iowa's at the TOP of the list of seats Chuck Schumer is working to flip in November. That's why I'm asking for you to take action today to stop the Democrats' momentum in Colorado and right here in Iowa.

Hey there friend,

Democrats across the country have been pouring money into crucial races in support of Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidates for U.S. Senate. Just last quarter, Democrats outraised key Republicans, showing the strength in Schumer's dark money machine.

One of those key Republicans was Senator Cory Gardner in Colorado.

Colorado's Senate seat is right next to Iowa's at the TOP of the list of seats Chuck Schumer is working to flip in November. That's why I'm asking for you to take action today to stop the Democrats' momentum in Colorado and right here in Iowa.

Senator Cory Gardner and I are both facing a major end-of-month deadline in just a few days and can't afford to fall short of our goals. **_Will you take action today to support our fight against Chuck Schumer 's plan to flip the Senate?_**

As Rita told you yesterday, they've finished the planting on the Hart farm and expect a fruitful season. Similarly on the campaign, we're in the stage where the effort we put in now will determine whether we're victorious in November. **[With the primary just around the corner, can you commit to donating $5 weekly until the June 2nd primary? That's the NUMBER ONE way to help us prepare for whatever the general election brings.](https://act.myngp.com/el/vexwWA14frxMZ6wREqw8YTx6Ne85jVSSwhMrbGIx_qI=/V5UDnpHzDGzSJwH6FIT0tLAob-OfvqgNbXADcKM0MGU=?refcode=200507-email&amount=5&recurring=true)** \- Team Rita! **\--- Original Message ---** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/vexwWA14frxMZ6wREqw8YTx6Ne85jVSSwhMrbGIx_qI=/ofTr3Fsz04nRVP5Iw7MF45auxUGHSpLIm5sypVRbQOU=?refcode=200507-email) We're almost done planting here at the Hart farm, and likewise, we need to plant the seeds of success for this campaign if we want a bountiful harvest come November. name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Do you want to meet the President?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Download the Official Trump 2020 App.
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a664924ec4a41ddfcb801a037616a9272069ee9b7a87580abb787b2860adf8574c01c51bfaab7f9aefcd8f1228a09b0d49a)
---

**MEET PRESIDENT TRUMP THIS FALL!**

Friend,

Have you downloaded the**Official Trump 2020 App** yet?

Remember, this isn't any ordinary app. This is your **ALL-ACCESS PASS** to the President and his re-election campaign. When you download the app, you'll instantly unlock exclusive access and start earning points to:
* **Meet President Trump on the campaign trail later this year**
* **Win one-of-a-kind Trump Gear SIGNED by your President **
* **Take a photo with President Trump at a future event**
* **And, so much more.**

That's right. This is your exclusive, Patriots-ONLY, guaranteed opportunity to earn points that you can redeem toward meeting your favorite President.

_We 're sending President Trump a list of everyone who downloads the app within the **NEXT HOUR.** Will he see your name?_

**[Please download the Official Trump 2020 App to your device in the NEXT HOUR to start earning points to meet the President.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a6662f804e55ba9ef7b8a142dc8ac2ac87d2ba2cdfdc11e130714222134ee62c5fffd0be1ff231509823265be127fcebd7d)**__

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a66dc1d334405e109e3475c22337c201b050e277bbca76e7e1e03a67d72458b55c60a2c7402e4f4c057da4c742f56d003dd)

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020

**[DOWNLOAD THE APP NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a663d467f979237f01ebe646e062cc987ee88dad04c08e49a60f50f7b5ee5577d1faddd168ee8fe28f4eaac2ea8b1d38320)**

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** Your ALL-ACCESS PASS is inside
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a668a04614bf2dd471cbb66466643a568c8995ff5931d1ea50faf39bedd678b8e74177ac2fd9410a83e1645d19345900f61)**

| | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a668abadf2065b704ef90058c8d7a27708a118de6893ed219a925cb92b4511afebe4d4972e8da91703957365aa698daa8e5)
---

Friend,

In 2016, with the help of American Patriots from all across the Nation, we built an unbeatable movement that no Democrat could even come close to matching.

Now, as we head into November, my team is unveiling our next major breakthrough which, with your help, will enable us to reach voters far and wide:

**_[>> Get The Official Trump 2020 App Now <<](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a66f85260446bc9c7b06269c242c25d61e18b416418dfe9f0c0847f05957386a510fd0cd8b74ee8d4c01284be249c458107)_**
_This won 't be a boring app like you'll see with other candidates. _When you download this app, you'll instantly unlock exclusive access and offers. You can:
* **Become a Trump Team Leader**
* **Earn Trump Points toward epic rewards like meeting me on the campaign trail later this year**
* **Get EARLY-ACCESS to win Trump Gear that I personally HAND-SIGNED**
* **Become a Trump Digital Activist**
* **Join our Election Day Team**
* **Be the FIRST to know about all campaign updates**
* **And, you 'll even get exclusive access to new Trump merchandise**

This will be your **ALL-ACCESS PASS** to my reelection campaign. I'm only alerting my TOP SUPPORTERS about this exclusive app, so be sure to download it NOW before anyone else.

So what are you waiting for? Start earning Trump Reward Points now!

**[Please download the Official Trump 2020 App to your device NOW to stay in-the-know on what Team Trump is doing.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a669fa400e0210ce50eb4b80fae55cd5b49411d07874e3ad61162539c7517dc96afa8639e2ca2104a49ef3c0944f0ad522a)**

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a661b5957d32f2ee64a91d2b63fbf123151d86ed946c57d9bf50c2fafb6021179eb56930dbea2dced1307841771f4270e49)

**The Official Trump 2020 App** will be your source for REAL NEWS straight from my campaign and YOUR President.

This isn't just an app. This is your tool to **KEEP AMERICA GREAT for FOUR MORE YEARS!**

**[Join Team Trump and download the Official Trump 2020 App TODAY.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a667e37934cc751db45f561e66fb52c6c9ee3e26b6ceb36da1bf7027076cd72e6a688e13f3fc5e154dd0de10fde59f1a08d)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a66c5c2a946356bbe26a35fa19681c0325287b107603f9be1a6a157720414337a6fd14e6898b4633c2c70e27f10e6b8b545)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

**[DOWNLOAD THE APP NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a667b97b6454f9a32ceeabc2362247bb49733b32f26181c3b132a5bc03cbb0c3f000fbc8822add93d4e69a3031763bda639)**

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f15d841bb6794a666bee13fe5d3d3c951d0957ce541a1448b1c82505f7a791f9794cca687d4226c969d06883b2509cd727ab7ca285682360) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc3784d869f183b8b66e4889d3e8fcbe13b5cb744150ef3605e3b97fa355759f37cf7dad8788383fb2933fd79803608ab0b3ba89fe97176817) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c574a49f256ac68ff9f9977f55f724bde8838ff6a63ad27b7377af555d7f557473214a17feeb48cdf)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Rose=2C=20Barresi=20for=20Congress?=
subject: FACEBOOK LIVE—6:00 PM Today! Join us for a National Day of Prayer Discussion with Pastor Randy Barnett
body:
Community Conversations with Janet | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0fca063fa719/calling-all-patriots-12436458?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a2ea478256&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Hey Peter,

**With today being National Day of Prayer, we should never forget that it is vital we preserve our right to worship and pray in Oklahoma and America.**

For this reason, Janet is doing a** [Facebook Live... at 6:00 pm this evening](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=0217e15984&e=795c6d9796)**[!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4f6418ea13&e=795c6d9796)

**This will be an important discussion on religious liberty with Pastor Randy & Kay Barnett.**

**[Click here to join the conversation at 6:00 pm today!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=606282e39a&e=795c6d9796)**

**We will also have a prayer time to celebrate the National Day of Prayer.**

Please join us and [feel free to say hello in the Facebook comments](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e0eef6dd26&e=795c6d9796)!
You can also reply to this email with questions or [if you'd like to get involved with the campaign](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=db017aba56&e=795c6d9796). Thank you so much and Janet is looking forward to hearing from you!

**Sean Rose**
Grassroots Engagement & Communications Advisor
Janet Barresi for Congress 2020
Oklahoma 5th Congressional District
---
| [JOIN US: Facebook Live 6:00 PM TODAY!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=08f8feffb5&e=795c6d9796 "JOIN US: Facebook Live 6:00 PM TODAY!")
---
| | _Copyright © 2020 Janet for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147
[Add us to your address book](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14&e=795c6d9796) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14&e=795c6d9796&c=53ec564c23).

name: Team Kathy
subject: Newsletter: Updates from Kathy Manning, Democratic Candidate for NC-06
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | **UPDATES FROM KATHY MANNING, DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATE FOR NC-06** **MESSAGE FROM KATHY** |
---
Team Kathy is compiling a list of community resources that residents of NC-06 can use while we practice social distancing to "flatten the curve" of coronavirus. This list is not exhaustive but will be regularly updated by our team. If you know of a resource that is not included here, please email the details to [info@kathymanningfornc.com](mailto:info@kathymanningfornc.com).
[**NC-06 COVID-19 COMMUNITY RESOURCES**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a8/481772856/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.kathymanningfornc.com/covid-19-response")
[**APPLY FOR A NC COVID-19 RAPID RECOVERY LOAN**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a9/481772856/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://ncrapidrecovery.org/")
**[$125 MILLION TO HELP SMALL BUSINESSES THROUGH A LOAN FUND RUN BY THE GOLDEN LEAF FOUNDATION AND THE N.C. RURAL CENTER](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a9/481772856/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://ncrapidrecovery.org/")**
---
** STATE NEWS **
[](LINK)
---
* [Gov. Cooper allows NC to move into Phase 1 of lifting coronavirus restrictions](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a6/481772856/VEsC/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.newsobserver.com/news/coronavirus/article242507756.html")
* [Coronavirus bill shifts NC's school calendars earlier, among other education effects](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a7/481772856/VEsD/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.newsobserver.com/news/coronavirus/article242484941.html")
* [UNC System interim president says he plans to reopen campuses for 2020 fall semester but with changes](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a4/481772856/VEsA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://abc11.com/coronavirus-nc-unc-will-have-class-in-the-fall-covid-19-and-colleges/6137761/")

** REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS AT RISK **
[](LINK)
---
* [Trump vs. Pennsylvania: The Supreme Court is considering two dangerous administration rules that would allow bosses or universities to take away birth control coverage because of their personal objections.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a5/481772856/VEsB/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.scotusblog.com/case-files/cases/trump-v-pennsylvania/")
* [The Supreme Court recently heard arguments in June Medical Services v. Russo, a case that could decide the fate of abortion access in the U.S.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a2/481772856/VEsO/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.plannedparenthoodaction.org/pressroom/supreme-court-to-hear-case-later-today-that-could-be-the-beginning-of-the-end-of-roe")
* [Ruth Bader Ginsburg hospitalized, expects to participate in oral arguments Wednesday](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a3/481772856/VEsP/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.cbsnews.com/news/ruth-bader-ginsburg-hospitalized-supreme-court-oral-arguments/")

** LOCAL HEROES **
[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a0/481772856/VEsHBQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.journalnow.com/news/local/they-re-feeding-the-front-lines-and-supporting-local-business-fuel-the-fight-winston-salem/article_04245379-3c2e-5050-a3b1-5f5f6a5a54e7.html")
---
[**FUEL THE FIGHT WINSTON-SALEM HAS RAISED $30,000 FOR HOSPITAL WORKER MEALS**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a0/481772856/VEsHBA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.journalnow.com/news/local/they-re-feeding-the-front-lines-and-supporting-local-business-fuel-the-fight-winston-salem/article_04245379-3c2e-5050-a3b1-5f5f6a5a54e7.html")
A local grassroots campaign has raised more than $30,000 this spring to buy meals to feed hospital employees who are the front line of the fight against COVID-19.Fuel the Fight Winston-Salem is like dozens of similar campaigns being waged across the country to support both health-care workers and struggling restaurants during the coronavirus crisis.
** VIRTUAL TOWNHALL **
[](LINK)
---
[**COPING THROUGH COVID WITH DR. DAVID GUTTERMAN**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a1/481772856/VEsHBw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EQVe2jlzLJwJvaNaVqeSLkU6A0_exUqG/view")
Last week, Kathy was joined by Greensboro psychologist Dr. David Gutterman for our first virtual town hall. We discussed the impact of COVID-19 on our mental health and ways to cope with the additional stress of the public health crisis. View the video by following this link: [https://bit.ly/2W5q68X](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8a1/481772856/VEsHBg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EQVe2jlzLJwJvaNaVqeSLkU6A0_exUqG/view")
** TUNE IN **
[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8de/481772856/VEsHAQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://podcasts.google.com/feed/aHR0cHM6Ly9mZWVkcy5wb2R0cmFjLmNvbS96S3E2V1paTFRsYk0/episode/Z2lkOi8vYXJ0MTktZXBpc29kZS1sb2NhdG9yL1YwL0ZHcUROckEzSUpuNjBTSk5WR1pTZWtFc0xzMlRZaDJ3OTlLVHVCNUgwZWc?hl=en&ved=2ahUKEwjbh5y2k53pAhUCUt8KHQc7A8MQieUEegQIAhAE&ep=6")
---
[**THE DAILY: BURSTING THE COLLEGE BUBBLE**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8de/481772856/VEsHAA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://podcasts.google.com/feed/aHR0cHM6Ly9mZWVkcy5wb2R0cmFjLmNvbS96S3E2V1paTFRsYk0/episode/Z2lkOi8vYXJ0MTktZXBpc29kZS1sb2NhdG9yL1YwL0ZHcUROckEzSUpuNjBTSk5WR1pTZWtFc0xzMlRZaDJ3OTlLVHVCNUgwZWc?hl=en&ved=2ahUKEwjbh5y2k53pAhUCUt8KHQc7A8MQieUEegQIAhAE&ep=6")
On May 26 we will be hosting a virtual town hall on the disparate impact of the pandemic. I wanted to share this podcast, which shares a particularly touching example of the disparate impact of the pandemic on one college student. Please mark your calendars for the virtual town hall - I'll share more details with you soon. Stay well, Kathy.
** IDEAS FOR DEALING WITH THE COVID-19 CRISIS **
---
[**SEN. COONS, COLLEAGUES INTRODUCE LEGISLATION TO SIGNIFICANTLY EXPAND NATIONAL SERVICE PROGRAMS TO RESPOND TO COVID-19**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8df/481772856/VEsHAw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.coons.senate.gov/news/press-releases/sen-coons-colleagues-introduce-legislation-to-significantly-expand-national-service-programs-to-respond-to-covid-19")
The Pandemic Response and Opportunity Through National Service Act would fund 750,000 national service positions over a three-year response and recovery period, in part to meet the projected need for as many as 300,000 public health workers. Under the bill, the number of AmeriCorps and national service positions could expand from 75,000 to 150,000 the first year and double to 300,000 in years two and three.
** FAMILY MATTERS **
---
[**MOTHER 'S DAY 2020: WAYS TO CELEBRATE MOM WHILE SHELTERING IN PLACE**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d313/3d199a51/2f4b03c4/7364f8dc/481772856/VEsHAg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.forbes.com/sites/advisor/2020/05/01/love-in-the-time-of-coronavirus-mothers-day-gift-ideas-for-2020/#42443d4524d2")
It's going to be a very different Mother's Day for most families.There won't be fancy dinners out, trips to the theater or other such special activities that we normally associate with celebrating mom during her special day. Instead, they'll be sheltering in place, quarantine and social distancing. Fun, right? Well, actually, it can be.

clean_body: | | | UPDATES FROM KATHY MANNING, DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATE FOR NC-06 MESSAGE FROM KATHY | Team Kathy is compiling a list of community resources that residents of NC-06 can use while we practice social distancing to "flatten the curve" of coronavirus. This list is not exhaustive but will be regularly updated by our team. If you know of a resource that is not included here, please email the details to mailto:info@kathymanningfornc.com. "" "" "" STATE NEWS LINK "" "" "" REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS AT RISK LINK "" "" "" LOCAL HEROES "" "" A local grassroots campaign has raised more than $30,000 this spring to buy meals to feed hospital employees who are the front line of the fight against COVID-19.Fuel the Fight Winston-Salem is like dozens of similar campaigns being waged across the country to support both health-care workers and struggling restaurants during the coronavirus crisis. VIRTUAL TOWNHALL LINK "" Last week, Kathy was joined by Greensboro psychologist Dr. David Gutterman for our first virtual town hall. We discussed the impact of COVID-19 on our mental health and ways to cope with the additional stress of the public health crisis. View the video by following this link: "" TUNE IN "" "" On May 26 we will be hosting a virtual town hall on the disparate impact of the pandemic. I wanted to share this podcast, which shares a particularly touching example of the disparate impact of the pandemic on one college student. Please mark your calendars for the virtual town hall - I'll share more details with you soon. Stay well, Kathy. IDEAS FOR DEALING WITH THE COVID-19 CRISIS "" The Pandemic Response and Opportunity Through National Service Act would fund 750,000 national service positions over a three-year response and recovery period, in part to meet the projected need for as many as 300,000 public health workers. Under the bill, the number of AmeriCorps and national service positions could expand from 75,000 to 150,000 the first year and double to 300,000 in years two and three. FAMILY MATTERS "" It's going to be a very different Mother's Day for most families.There won't be fancy dinners out, trips to the theater or other such special activities that we normally associate with celebrating mom during her special day. Instead, they'll be sheltering in place, quarantine and social distancing. Fun, right? Well, actually, it can be. FOLLOW KATHY ONLINE "" "" "" "" | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please ""

#
