name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Letting Criminals Free While Jailing Business Owners
body:
Help me stop the madness! |
---
| |
---
| I've had enough. It’s time to stop the madness!

While our government leaders are [releasing criminals](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=35509665b6&e=41f8e27552) from prison to protect them from COVID-19 - [small business owners are being arrested](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=b16381b616&e=41f8e27552) and **jailed** for trying to save their businesses!

Clay Jenkins of Texas, a far left Democrat Judge, jailed Shelley Luther, a single mom and owner of a Dallas hair salon for trying to feed her family.

[I have spent the last week visiting with small business owners](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=3fc7a829ec&e=41f8e27552), church leaders and physicians to learn how COVID-19 is affecting their businesses. It is heartbreaking. Thanks to ill-advised decisions by many government leaders, we are learning that the ravages of our locked-down economy may be worse than the virus itself. Many of the “scientific models” grossly overstated the crisis and created a climate of fear. We must not allow fear to outweigh common sense.

25% of American workers have filed for unemployment. What we need right now is LEADERSHIP. We need a businessman with 25 years of experience growing jobs in Kansas. We need a plan to reopen our economy in a way that is SAFE and SMART.

It can’t be a cookie-cutter one-size-fits-all plan. After all, Kansas isn’t NYC.

Let’s get our economy back on track, and get our people back to work, before it is too late.

I hope you will join me as I continue my campaign to become the next Senator for the people of Kansas. The stakes have never been higher, and [every donation makes a difference](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=54a719ffd2&e=41f8e27552), no matter the amount.

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=a76d8012bb&e=41f8e27552 "DONATE NOW")
---
| I have had enough, what about you?
---
| [VIEW DAVE'S PRIORITIES](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=a07dab2340&e=41f8e27552 "VIEW DAVE'S PRIORITIES")
---
| |
---

_**Thank you again for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!**_ **Dave**

name: GeorgetteGomez.org
subject: Tell Betsy DeVos: Stop garnishing wages!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17413893/193396156/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDMwM2ExZi1hZTkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_Xk7dApes7MAMd27omtO7ZHZr9N0_XkQU_Lq93oL-U=&emci=bcf0a861-8f90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=2d303a1f-ae90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
_**POLITICO**_
**“Betsy DeVos sued for seizing wages during pandemic”** **[Stand up to DeVos](https://secure.ngpvan.com/KyPMD2fxc0K1s3h6lb8DwA2)**
* * *
**285,000.**

That’s the number of student loan borrowers in this country who had their wages garnished by Betsy DeVos in March because they fell behind on making loan payments.

This was happening despite the fact that Congress called for suspension of wage garnishment during the COVID-19 crisis. DeVos initially announced she’d implement Congress’ wishes, but new evidence -- and a lawsuit filed against DeVos -- shows that garnishments continued during the crisis.

At a time when millions are out of work and struggling, the idea that wages are being garnished is cruel and highlights the need for bold student debt reform. [**Can you sign our petition calling on Betsy DeVos and the DOE to return all garnished wages and end this practice immediately?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17413894/193396157/1724003067?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDMwM2ExZi1hZTkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_Xk7dApes7MAMd27omtO7ZHZr9N0_XkQU_Lq93oL-U=&emci=bcf0a861-8f90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=2d303a1f-ae90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
**[Stand up to DeVos](https://secure.ngpvan.com/KyPMD2fxc0K1s3h6lb8DwA2)** This pandemic has exposed the need for new investments in the American people.

**It also highlights how important it is that we continue fighting for _progressive_ policies such as cancelling all student debt outright to help jumpstart our economy.**

We can get this done, but it starts with holding bad actors like DeVos accountable.

[**Sign the petition to stand up to DeVos >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17413895/193396158/1724003067?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDMwM2ExZi1hZTkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_Xk7dApes7MAMd27omtO7ZHZr9N0_XkQU_Lq93oL-U=&emci=bcf0a861-8f90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=2d303a1f-ae90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)

Thank you,

_Team Gómez_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-050720-all-a)**

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17413896/193396159/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDMwM2ExZi1hZTkwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_Xk7dApes7MAMd27omtO7ZHZr9N0_XkQU_Lq93oL-U=&emci=bcf0a861-8f90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=2d303a1f-ae90-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864) Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. clean_body: | POLITICO “Betsy DeVos sued for seizing wages during pandemic” 285,000. That’s the number of student loan borrowers in this country who had their wages garnished by Betsy DeVos in March because they fell behind on making loan payments. This was happening despite the fact that Congress called for suspension of wage garnishment during the COVID-19 crisis. DeVos initially announced she’d implement Congress’ wishes, but new evidence -- and a lawsuit filed against DeVos -- shows that garnishments continued during the crisis. At a time when millions are out of work and struggling, the idea that wages are being garnished is cruel and highlights the need for bold student debt reform. This pandemic has exposed the need for new investments in the American people. It also highlights how important it is that we continue fighting for progressive policies such as cancelling all student debt outright to help jumpstart our economy. We can get this done, but it starts with holding bad actors like DeVos accountable. Thank you, Team Gómez | Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.** Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. name: Corky Messner
subject: 180 days to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
I need your help to defeat Jeanne Shaheen in November. Read more to find out how you can help >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3038a48c5dbf563e/f7975e0275021239c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, We are 180 days until Election Day, and it’s more important than ever we now capitalize on my campaign’s momentum to get Jeanne Shaheen out of office. The Democrats know that winning New Hampshire is going to be key to their attempt to win back majority of the Senate, and we need to use all of our resources to ensure that doesn’t happen. D.C. Jeanne is a puppet for Chuck Schumer, and is playing his political games during the current coronavirus crisis, delaying vital relief funds for small businesses in desperate need. **She’s just another career politician, and not good for New Hampshire or America**. My ideas and philosophy are 180 degrees from D.C. Jeanne Shaheen. While she works for the D.C. Swamp insiders like Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi, I will be fighting for the hard-working families of the Granite State.

After using the Governor’s seat as a stepping stone to the U.S. Senate and spending almost two decades in the Swamp, Shaheen’s long tenure in politics needs to come to an end. In fact, I’ve signed a pledge to serve no more than two terms, because I don’t believe career politicians understand the lives of “regular” citizens, who have to earn an honest living to pay their rents and feed their families. We need a real leader in Washington who will stand up for American families and workers, not more of the same partisan game players. We need real change in 2020 and beyond, and I’m running to make a decisive change in New Hampshire’s representation compared to Jeanne Shaheen’s liberal policies. Now that we’re only 180 days out from the election, it’s crucial that we kick our efforts into overdrive, and every dollar could make-or-break our success. **[Will you help me fix all of the mistakes Jeanne Shaheen has made at the helm by donating $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can, today?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3038a48c5dbf563e/9a7654d440c92d35c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** I rely on small donors to keep our campaign going and reach out to voters, not corporate PACs and donors like Jeanne Shaheen. Every dollar you donate goes directly towards my campaign and voter outreach.

**With just 180 days to go, my team and I are focused on success – defeating Jeanne Shaheen.[Will you help us capitalize on our strong momentum?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3038a48c5dbf563e/674cb25392dc6c9dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **[Donate $5 to defeat D.C. **[Donate $25 to defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3038a48c5dbf563e/939cd10e547438d5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

name: Dick Durbin
subject: McConnell's intern vs. a Democratic Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
_We hope that you are keeping safe during this pandemic, Peter. We know this is a difficult time for many, so please only contribute if you are able to do so. We are more committed than ever to a Democratic victory in November and are grateful you 're in this fight._

Peter,
Lately, the polls and experts are catching up to what we already know:
**Democrats can win big this November -- and take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell.**
There's much work to be done during this national emergency. But in Washington, Mitch McConnell called Senators back to promote his former intern to the second-highest court in the land. That's what's wrong with Congress in a nutshell, and why we need to elect a Democratic Senate majority this fall.
In Colorado and Montana, Democratic candidates Steve Bullock and John Hickenlooper are posing serious challenges to GOP incumbents and boosting our chances of a Democratic Senate majority.
And in Minnesota, Democratic Senator Tina Smith is fighting tooth and nail to defend her seat -- we can't afford to lose a single incumbent and still win this fight.
**[So here's my ask: will you split $5 now between John Hickenlooper in Colorado, Steve Bullock in Montana, Tina Smith in Minnesota, and my campaign here in Illinois?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-may-2020?refcode=em200506i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Peter, taking back control of the Senate is a fight we can win.
But if we're going to elect a Democratic majority, we need to support our candidates each step of the way. They simply can't succeed in these must-win fights if we don't have their backs.
That's why I'm doing all I can to not only hold on to our Democratic seat here in Illinois, but also elect (and re-elect) as many Democrats as we can all over the country this November.
**[Can I count on you to join me in this fight? Split a $5 contribution to support our efforts to put Democrats over the top as we work to reclaim the Senate from the GOP.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-may-2020?refcode=em200506i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-may-2020?refcode=em200506i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff40be/42ab3cf4/609ccf58/135d20f2/1145415737/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff40be/42ab3cf4/609ccf58/135d20f3/1145415737/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

Chicago, IL 60654

And all the... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525719/45c30650/1cbe9f380/66e93a67/3569746208/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**To say thank you and to commemorate the fact that our fight goes on, we 're releasing a limited-edition enamel pin that says "I'm A Warren Democrat."** [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525719/45c30650/1cbe9f380/66e93a66/3569746208/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnItcGluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIwNkZfUElOX0xBVV9UXzIwMjAwNTA3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr-pin?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR06F_PIN_LAU_T_20200507_V1S1_P") **[If you can, make a contribution of $25 or more, and we'll send you a free pin as a thank you. You'll help grow our grassroots movement, elect Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot, and lift up the voices of working people -- at a time when they need to be heard more than ever.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525719/45c30650/1cbe9f380/66e93a66/3569746208/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnItcGluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIwNkZfUElOX0xBVV9UXzIwMjAwNTA3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr-pin?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR06F_PIN_LAU_T_20200507_V1S1_P")**

Every time you put on the pin, you'll get to remember that you're a part of a grassroots movement. You'll remember that Elizabeth is counting on supporters like you to keep fighting. And you'll remember that you own a piece of every victory we win.

From fighting hard in special elections this spring, to protecting the House, taking back the Senate, and winning the White House this November, we've got a lot on our plates this year.

And all the while, Elizabeth will keep fighting to protect people's lives and livelihoods during this pandemic crisis -- with short-term relief and long-term solutions.

**But it 's only possible with the support of grassroots donors like you. And this pin will only be available for a limited time.

[You're at the heart of our movement, and, let's face it, this pin would look great on you. Donate $25 or more, and it'll be in the mail to you shortly.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525719/45c30650/1cbe9f380/66e93a66/3569746208/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnItcGluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIwNkZfUElOX0xBVV9UXzIwMjAwNTA3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr-pin?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR06F_PIN_LAU_T_20200507_V1S1_P")**

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Endorsed by the United States Chamber of Commerce
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Did you see the news? **Yesterday**** I was endorsed by the United States Chamber of Commerce. **In their endorsement CEO Tom Donahue said: _" In difficult times, we are reminded of the importance of having leaders that understand the genius of the American system of government and free enterprise and who are willing to tackle the hard problems that confront our nation. As we take on this pandemic and work to not just reopen our economy, but return to growth, and expanded opportunities for all Americans, we need leaders, like Chris Jacobs, who has a proven track record of legislating responsibly and standing up for good policies. The U.S. Chamber is proud to lend its endorsement to Chris Jacobs and looks forward to partnering with him in the future."_
I have been a small businessman for over 18 years and I have been proud to create hundreds of jobs for Western New Yorkers and have worked to build up our communities. I truly believe small business will be the driving force for our region's comeback and**I am looking forward to making this a priority of my Congressional Agenda. ** As we defeat COVID-19 and the challenges it has created - we need a conservative leader with **the record and experience of fighting for Western New York businesses** to ensure their voices are heard in Washington. I'm proud to have the Chamber's endorsement and **I promise to work diligently with them and President Trump** to enact pro-business policies and roll back burdensome Obama-era regulations - so that we can support small businesses now, and create many more in the future. Thank you for your continued support and stay safe.
Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/5zs42vPmkRrBi4EkS4HNfw/892E7VXAndclcGpaF9ImNdbg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/tLPdOqRsgdV18PKA2z763prw/892E7VXAndclcGpaF9ImNdbg)
* * *

Peter,

**MJ has a new mission: flip the United States Senate.**

If that sounds like a tall order, that's because it is. But for this combat veteran, working mom, and kickass Texas Democrat, tough missions aren't anything new. She's seen 'em before.

**[Here's how you can help: Donate $1 ASAP so MJ can complete her mission to beat Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a8/7f51f7bc/4f8fdb79/4ef154e0/2332074734/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200507.2nd_A__1365__&amount=1")**

MJ doesn't back down from a fight. She took on the Taliban when her helicopter was shot down in Afghanistan, she took on the Pentagon to open military jobs to women, and now she's taking that fight to Mitch McConnell's right-hand man, Sen. John Cornyn.

**This will be a tough fight. It 'll take heart, resilience, and a hefty dose of Texas-tough grit. But MJ is ready to take this battle on. Are you? [Join the cause by pitching in $1.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a8/7f51f7bc/4f8fdb79/4ef154e0/2332074734/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200507.2nd_A__1365__&amount=1")**

\-- Team MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a8/7f51f7bc/4f8fdb79/4ef154e0/2332074734/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200507.2nd_A__1365__&amount=1")

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a8/7f51f7bc/4f8fdb79/4ef154e7/2332074734/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1365&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900a8/7f51f7bc/4f8fdb79/4ef154e6/2332074734/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
subject: I agree with President Trump...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, did you see this recent tweet from President Trump? * |
Dear Peter, I just wanted to put the urgent email below back at the top of your inbox, just in case you missed it. As you may know, our highly-effective minority voter outreach radio ads have been airing in key minority markets in crucial swing states **since August** , _including our newest ads in Michigan supporting veteran John James for U.S. Senate_. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EJ6MIUe&) **Peter, if we're going to win this election, then it's absolutely crucial we stay**ON THE AIR** all the way up through Election Day...** **...and the May payment is NOW DUE...** [So please respond today with your most generous contribution.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EMFdJAt&) [I know I can count on you, Peter.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EwANVoI&) _For America,_ \- John P.S. _My original message to you with more details is below..._
---|---

* * *
| | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, We need your help to turn this ship around! You see, new polls show President Donald Trump and Black Conservative SUPERSTAR John James are currently **LOSING** \- _though very narrowly_ \- in the vitally important swing state of **Michigan**. Look at John James' numbers against incumbent Democrat Senator Gary Peters: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EQjjtsT&) And look at this Quinnipiac poll showing a very close presidential race in Michigan: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EwGJBzs&) Of course, there's still 6 months until Election Day... ...but we MUST work hard to **Make Michigan RED** for President Trump! ...and we MUST work hard to elect Black Conservative Superstar John James to the U.S. Senate in Michigan! So what's our plan to **Make Michigan RED** this election? **Run radio ads targeting African-American voters.** In fact, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC is currently running highly-effective radio ads on Black radio stations in Michigan and critical swing states and Congressional races across the country! Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television, billboards, books, and issue guides targeting African-America voters and exposing the race-baiting lies liberals have been spoon-feeding them... **...and the results have been incredible.** Study after study has shown that our ads over the past few years have significantly improved Republican votes from African-Americans. If we can take back just 17% of the black vote from Democrats, then it's impossible for them to win... ...and if we can convince 25% of Black voters to vote **RED** in 2020, we could create a massive RED TSUNAMI – up and down the ballot! | [Chip-In $20.20 to Make Michigan RED ›››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=E9SGyCj&)
---
**That's not as difficult as it sounds considering 33% of black voters already call themselves conservatives and support conservative policies --- but they still vote for Democrats.**
**Making Michigan RED** this election means touting President Trump's accomplishments for the Black community:
* Record low unemployment rate for African-Americans
* Federal funding for Historically Black Colleges and Universities
* Scholarships for African-American families seeking better quality schools
* Ending the killing of unborn Black babies by appointing conservative judges

[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFyUB0H&)**Making Michigan RED** this election means electing John James as Michigan's first African American (from either party) to the United States Senate...
**Making Michigan RED** this election means persuading enough African-American voters to stop voting for the failed socialist policies that have turned Detroit and Flint into poverty-stricken war zones...
**Making Michigan RED** this election means mobilizing the conservative grassroots army that got Donald Trump elected four years ago...
That's why we need to keep our hard-hitting radio ads on Black radio stations in Michigan up-and-running through Election Day.
[Peter, can you please help us continue running effective radio ads in Michigan by giving a contribution of $20.20, $35, $75, $150 or more today?](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=E9NrBvr&)
Without the continued support of patriotic conservatives like you, there's no way we can keep our proven radio ads running...
...and the consequences of our failure in Michigan could result in the Democrats seizing control of the U.S. Senate and the White House --- _giving them the power to force their entire socialist agenda on every single American_.
[So please make your most generous contribution to keep our radio ads up-and-running through Election Day...](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EyAzhz&)
...and please **FORWARD** this email to your patriotic friends and family-members.
Tell them how vitally important the swing state of Michigan is and how our effective radio ads will Make Michigan RED for President Trump and John James!
**Remember, if the Democrats lose just 17% of the African American vote, they cannot win!**
[How much we can do is in your hands, so please respond today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EIbxtbd&)
Thank you, Peter! It's my honor to work beside you on behalf of America.
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._
National Headquarters | P.O. Box 1351 | Merrifield, VA 22116-1351
[www.StarsAndStripesForeverPAC.org](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGhOpB&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EGO7wUO&)
---

You're receiving this email because you are committed to protecting America from rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying conservative values.
If you are giving up on this critical fight, please UNSUBSCRIBE below.
| | Stars & Stripes Forever PAC, PO Box 1351, 22116, Merrifield, United States
---
You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=36hpV&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EMUPGi6&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=36hpV&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EQTTC3b&pt=change_details) at any time.
[ ](https://app.getresponse.com/referral.html?x=a62b&c=ytWvg&u=z93TV&z=E9eqIZU&)

name: Team Christy
subject: Out of luck? No chance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | | [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00ee/1474663500/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full")
---
Peter,

This election is not in our favor right now.

We're behind on the vote-by-mail count, Mike Garcia is outspending us with a nearly $300,000 TV ad-buy, and Donald Trump is attacking us on Twitter, relentlessly.

**Pundits might see us as out of luck -- but we know better than that.**

There's still time on the clock to overcome the odds and close this gap. We can deliver a win so powerful that it spurs a tidal wave of excitement across the nation.

**[But we can't do it without your help. Chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help hit our goals and build momentum for Democrats across the nation.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00ee/1474663500/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full")**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00ef/1474663500/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00e8/1474663500/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00e9/1474663500/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00ea/1474663500/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00eb/1474663500/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00ee/1474663500/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full")
We're definitely the underdogs in this race -- but so were Democrats in 2018, and they brought about a blue wave unlike anything we've seen in decades.

This race is different -- it's a special election conducted almost entirely by-mail -- but folks in CA-25 still have a strong desire for new leadership and change.

Republicans are chomping at the bit to flip this seat back -- **but we won't let that happen.**

**[We're going to stop Republican momentum now, and come November, we'll see the continuation of the 2020 blue wave that we started right here, right now. Pitch in now to make it happen.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00ee/1474663500/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full")**

Thanks so much for your help. We're a few days away -- let's do this.

\-- Team Christy

[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbfd/29776869/a73f004/569f00ee/1474663500/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDdfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200507_milliongoal11-full")

Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

body:
We can't believe this isn't being reported more.

| **_IMPORTANT NEWS from The Washington Post:_
"Trump says he will FIRE Intelligence Watchdog at the center of Ukraine Impeachment Scandal"** Peter -- This corruption is SICKENING.

clean_body: The new Democrat Party's platform is not new policy; it's a replication of socialism that has failed in countries around the world time and again. Peter, The new Democrat Party's platform is not new policy; it's a replication of socialism that has failed in countries around the world time and again. China, Russia, Venezuela, and so many other countries have instituted socialist policies at one point in their histories, and each time, socialism failed their citizens miserably, with empty promises and devastating consequences. I know the harsh conditions workers are placed in under socialism. Throughout my business career, I have traveled to Russia and China. I have seen the brutal working conditions that we in the United States would never stand for. How can radical liberals preach worker's rights and socialism? It must be because they have not seen the effects of socialism firsthand. Democrats’ socialist rhetoric is growing increasingly dangerous for our country. As leaders of the free world, we must stand up and fight against it now, before it’s too late. Most of us understand what socialism provides — harsh conditions, starvation, and high taxes. Under socialist states, each of these realities are put into place BY POLITICIANS so they can reap the benefits and live luxurious lifestyles. Don't fall into the trap of believing politicians who preach about socialist ideals or a utopian society in which everything is free. It's a scam. The work of a Congressperson is to serve the people they represent, not rule over them. This includes helping our fellow American, not suppressing them under a socialist regime. CD-5 does not deserve socialism, and we certainly don’t deserve Kendra Horn's socialist-complicit representation. Join our fight to fix Congress and bring real representation to CD-5. Let's stand up for our freedom and make it known: There is no place for socialism in America. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: The right thing to do
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sg_0QmVljUGAI1i6n7StiyVDeQwiC4EMkbObqfHJ31A=/6pABUoSKqdhHjD3CbhpX7aLJslB8X1vSkZtM8f6beqk=?refcode=050720)
| | Friend, Today the Minnesota House passed the COVID-19 Economic Security package - it was the right thing to do. **Minnesotans ' economic security has been hit hard during this public health crisis and we have the resources to help them make it through.** Now is the time to invest in Minneostans, not turn our backs on them. The package includes:
* $100 million in assistance for Minnesota renters, homeowners, and landlords
* Temporary increase in pay for personal care assistants who serve Minnesotans with disabilities, our seniors, and other vulnerable populations
* $15 million in a new Distance Learning Broadband Access Grant Program to provide students with the equipment necessary to access learning materials on the internet and reimburse school districts for costs to provide broadband access
* $10 million in the state's Border-to-Border Broadband Grant Program to expand high-speed broadband, with the funding targeted to unserved areas
* $55 million to the Small Business Emergency Loan Program at the Minnesota Department of Employment and Economic Development (DEED). The program's original $30 million has since been exhausted.

Minnesotans deserve economic security during this pandemic, and those least likely to have it are being hardest hit. **House DFLers are continuing to work to ensure Minnesotans can make ends meet during this crisis and beyond.** We will get through this by investing in our people, in our state, and in a better future for all of us. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [_P.S. In Minnesota you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be**completely refunded** to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund program._](https://act.myngp.com/el/sg_0QmVljUGAI1i6n7StiyVDeQwiC4EMkbObqfHJ31A=/6pABUoSKqdhHjD3CbhpX7aLJslB8X1vSkZtM8f6beqk=?refcode=050720) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sg_0QmVljUGAI1i6n7StiyVDeQwiC4EMkbObqfHJ31A=/6pABUoSKqdhHjD3CbhpX7aLJslB8X1vSkZtM8f6beqk=?refcode=050720)

name: Bloomberg Philanthropies
subject: Road to Recovery: When can we reopen?
body:
Perspectives from a public health expert

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=9ecb3249c91c4feb95cd103ec7398ff8&_e=36eE-fv8urk59RmaMcUNAmtg-bscMYM6knWe3ulIRql8hD6zvo89rMBs14LZ-kdVphJwTX3yz0E0K5brfzD4Zdrj2FEnw8mSxk6PpVxCz52E4fI-qVksTz7INAVzid7vk5tBUgpQQhDggjZa9yOUU_OwBks6_AzWigWh-oDeWmJRI71iVf0sKK2q3hMqHAQuUOCOSFdeS3uIIP544NlFSqD_LDdISERFZGI9dJvr9pOslxroHK8Jt_ElvgRRyecZ98PORKQAPXnEF8mQT019GBWBGlnEU4eO8reRawIlBGYACzmYS5YNWoBETA8Rns5M) Friend -- Right now, states and cities are deciding when to relax stay-at-home orders and reopen businesses, schools, and other public spaces. But what will it take to make sure we do it right? When can we reopen?

It's less "about a particular date to reopen society" than it is about taking the right steps to prepare, says Dr. Kelly Henning, leader of our Public Health program. Hear what those steps are in this video from our Road to Recovery series: [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=9ecb3249c91c4feb95cd103ec7398ff8&_e=36eE-fv8urk59RmaMcUNArBv-XzKqUD7CU0Fsimi8XtR_NDGsgt3jWojcSPoXaKlx-lurSrdFgaEmS3eGcabtg-5F8E7f8sP4QvMiUqEAkFLClIu9aFpGOCR9RU3uSjFDMUHuI8Zs9xgimct_SZh1y2HLhSkwoZBGzVSRCX_pERYev4Ud1sGBv9pxrzPeLqvagwQehhuwjMjjznSwT4eIQuqhCkPCHhXppsNcvKu18lAxB5dA_dZp7rLGeksglQsQZanOaBOvw1D1G1pNN4sFNMEFziDCzX1rg_0RFniXGD1J_5fgRU1SvLEboKVtQ7BUAraRJ7KZMHOjqReEGnsgF41rHyI9tHC_XyTvQIhrCG4UYSmvW2kdYWein0nneDE-26dF6_naJPu-TzV8eflbQ%3D%3D)

name: Team Warner
subject: Save the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Postal Service isn't something we can afford to lose, even in the digital age.
|
---
| | Derek --

The U.S. Postal Service is in trouble.

This vital service is in dire financial straits, but President Trump has said he'll block emergency funding to keep the postal service from going bankrupt during this pandemic.

The Postal Service isn't something we can afford to lose, even in the digital age. It processes 182 million pieces of first-class mail **every day.** A lot of those pieces of mail are medication, bills, bill payments, and other important documents.

Plus, during this time of unprecedented physical distancing, the postal system is providing a vital service to thousands of Americans who want to stay in touch with loved ones. Come November, many more Americans may want to utilize this system to cast their ballots by mail.

**Without Congressional action, there 's a real possibility that our postal system will cease to exist. [Will you sign our joint petition and show your support for the U.S. Postal Service?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4a6/53d9897e/54f1b733/1c886f73/939565277/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?code=Warner&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-usps%23")**

Saving the Postal Service does more than keep us connected -- it keeps people employed. The U.S. Postal Service employs 600,000 folks across the country, and now their employment hangs in the balance. These hardworking people could lose their jobs unless Congress acts quickly to help the postal service.

**[Sign on to let the Trump administration know you want to save the U.S. Postal Service.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4a6/53d9897e/54f1b733/1c886f73/939565277/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?code=Warner&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-usps%23")**

Thank you for your support,

-- Team Warner

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4a6/53d9897e/54f1b733/1c886f72/939565277/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200507_p_1_fl__568__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|

Williamsburg, VA 23185

Come November, many more Americans may want to utilize this system to cast their ballots by mail. Without Congressional action, there 's a real possibility that our postal system will cease to exist. "" Saving the Postal Service does more than keep us connected -- it keeps people employed. The U.S. Postal Service employs 600,000 folks across the country, and now their employment hangs in the balance. These hardworking people could lose their jobs unless Congress acts quickly to help the postal service. "" Thank you for your support, -- Team Warner | "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| | Peter, D.C. statehood isn't about politics -- it's about equal representation. [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b0/72412298/4f4b97a3/61049f08/2505757798/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/demand-dc-statehood-now-test?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200507_DCStatehood_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200507_DCStatehood_U1_X1") D.C. has a population of more than 700,000 people -- larger than some states. But Mayor Muriel Bowser essentially serves as the mayor, county executive, and governor of the District. The District is operating like a state but currently has ZERO Senators and ZERO voting members of Congress. **The District is left without representation because Republicans know it would elect two new Democratic Senators.**_They 're afraid because that's enough to flip the Senate and enact real progressive change -- like universal healthcare and a tax code where their super rich, mega-donors have to pay their fair share!_ **It 's clear to us that D.C. MUST become an official state now! [We NEED 10,000 signatures in the next 24-hours from Americans who support D.C. statehood. Will you be one of those signatures?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b0/72412298/4f4b97a3/61049f0b/2505757798/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/demand-dc-statehood-now-test?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+We+NEED+10000+signatures+in+the+next+24h&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200507_DCStatehood_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200507_DCStatehood_U1_X1")** | | | [Sign Here ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b0/72412298/4f4b97a3/61049f0a/2505757798/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/demand-dc-statehood-now-test?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Sign+Here+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200507_DCStatehood_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200507_DCStatehood_U1_X1")

D.C. has yet to become a state because Republicans KNOW and FEAR what it means for their party's dangerous agenda! Trump said it himself on Monday:

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Biden-Brindisi for China?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
It’s never been more clear: The United States must stand up to China. ** BEIJING BIDEN AND ANTHONY BRINDISI - WEAK ON CHINA** In this time of crisis, we simply cannot afford their dangerous ignorance. Join me to stand up to China now. [ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0c429a487b444e940bae59de5c2975&_e=AYp3lwiTNBRk9TOuO9ESaZUc3MBzVlQ-268oBN7LXje4D6zQFJC76BvLdHicgrRFyDUvHoVAs1VNhwTLWS6MCG128lQHBb5r25lpesbjcN7yRfxcw8tc47-Ux_DUkaPqQVXy_mv9LAq-QfviJ2EVIwrdiMHNTHB-_mqtgELr99HmolbzbNiPBfsHCgyneFbRgPvVAaKepESY-Ih6ALPeUUBi0_FSSWIzJlyIZxaJYvcM1CaqppmiuG0sBGE4tB2AgjpOgJhvf-y0UzoYjVaCJrIYLKyKZ8N6Clt792yaz5CKCcEcXjBsjmMubgmi3MGUmHxfeEZFVd7s-dDeVx6M2V56HH5F4Xz1FKwX-Jmimjkmzgbg73YsAcOES-VZNkVYo7JKKPmBWTZdqwT7iER9CH6R5VSdYD16u6eJSCf6jh8%3D) [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0c429a487b444e940bae59de5c2975&_e=AYp3lwiTNBRk9TOuO9ESaZUc3MBzVlQ-268oBN7LXje4D6zQFJC76BvLdHicgrRFyDUvHoVAs1VNhwTLWS6MCG128lQHBb5r25lpesbjcN7yRfxcw8tc47-Ux_DUkaPqQVXy_mv9LAq-QfviJ2EVIwrdiMHNTHB-_mqtgELr99HmolbzbNiPBfsHCgyneFbRgPvVAaKepESY-Ih6ALPeUU95ib16Hz_eesYuLslkoEtf8j8K_An5vobeiYHtc1zFtAbUL4S76qewjREdLBZDqI-ChQ8JD67KUAZ2AwJRPbptwFD0Eqf-SppQ-UvsX7gJFOys6IOqKYueQmbRAojzyq2XhybTp0wR1jQczHm21d4_mH-liJqSU8Z3Y7llaUWNYPJLQybM3-bhcHmQLSwc1oLWGeWFfTyP3DTps4LuccM%3D) | |
---
Peter,

It’s never been more clear: The United States must stand up to China.

With their history of stealing hundreds of billions of dollars from US companies, spying on Americans, and ultimately being responsible for COVID-19, most everyone agrees there must be serious consequences.

_Everyone except Joe Biden and Anthony Brindisi, that is._
[ **JOIN ME TO STAND UP TO CHINA NOW >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0c429a487b444e940bae59de5c2975&_e=AYp3lwiTNBRk9TOuO9ESaZUc3MBzVlQ-268oBN7LXje4D6zQFJC76BvLdHicgrRFyDUvHoVAs1VNhwTLWS6MCG128lQHBb5r25lpesbjcN7yRfxcw8tc47-Ux_DUkaPqQVXy_mv9LAq-QfviJ2EVIwrdiMHNTHB-_mqtgELr99HmolbzbNiPBfsHCgyneFbRgPvVAaKepESY-Ih6ALPeUbPGjz9AfxcM1JVmNMZEQuFUIdbxmWoPFv2NjrtElYU_YSw3uzFYw4T4_mXFk927ctlgmt-tEhAOCvkS87_3u-p8VA36L3310Zh-oms2WhEgkb9fo0tfD0DUlb22EaQmLuplfy6cwNkDgq_KGjTNjC37u3-fqAxigW3CrY-znMY5GQs19EbHnNrl3E6safHRNSgG5210YUSL6FgcuMyHkS0%3D)
Peter, the candidate Anthony Brindisi has endorsed for President has a record that’s questionable at best when it comes to taking on China.

As Vice-President, Joe Biden PROMOTED the unequal, unfair relationship the United States has with China. He supported sending American jobs overseas saying “It’s in our self-interest for China to continue to prosper."

**While Biden has served in political office we’ve seen the manufacturing of most vital goods and medical supplies go to China. And now, in this crisis, we can confidently say it was NOT in our best interest at all.**

We cannot afford this dangerous ignorance when it comes to the serious threat of China. That’s why I need you to sign my petition to tell Beijing Biden and his lackey Anthony Brindisi that it’s time to stand up to China.
[ **SIGN YOUR NAME >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0c429a487b444e940bae59de5c2975&_e=AYp3lwiTNBRk9TOuO9ESaZUc3MBzVlQ-268oBN7LXje4D6zQFJC76BvLdHicgrRFyDUvHoVAs1VNhwTLWS6MCG128lQHBb5r25lpesbjcN7yRfxcw8tc47-Ux_DUkaPqQVXy_mv9LAq-QfviJ2EVIwrdiMHNTHB-_mqtgELr99HmolbzbNiPBfsHCgyneFbRgPvVAaKepESY-Ih6ALPeUZ9wiHLWtttBhgLhgIMgnMhyPWXKePwqJBz4pMuncivLZvGqP102-jyu7vhQ8t8mRzrHmOcakV5s3SCaug95LHNLTQ6tG8f5bS0sUwWFx6XNKGlfE_sPqvvTNFTVJJLbgjikbTDFDDS50mAX8G19KjvN-i4YTa5T1QCmnUrMwxx_z_jSQ4Mta_elcdoo58iz5LkKMV9xrpK3dR9TwCcR3e0%3D)
As if Biden’s weakness wasn’t bad enough, his presidential campaign - the one Brindisi supports - has time and time again been caught using Chinese PROPAGANDA spin when it comes to battling COVID-19.

**Even in this time of crisis, Beijing Biden kowtows to China instead of standing for the United States.**

Let’s send a clear message to both Biden and Brindisi that we need a president and a representative who will stand up to China and be a leader instead of enabling a dangerous regime that threatens American lives.

Sign your name today: **[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/BeijingBiden](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0c429a487b444e940bae59de5c2975&_e=AYp3lwiTNBRk9TOuO9ESaZUc3MBzVlQ-268oBN7LXje4D6zQFJC76BvLdHicgrRFyDUvHoVAs1VNhwTLWS6MCG128lQHBb5r25lpesbjcN7yRfxcw8tc47-Ux_DUkaPqQVXy_mv9LAq-QfviJ2EVIwrdiMHNTHB-_mqtgELr99HmolbzbNiPBfsHCgyneFbRgPvVAaKepESY-Ih6ALPeUWbHnf5p06RFrkvqRFsyuNyPHEq4oQY4uMaTd46z0zCMpgxeZL-V6s869QWqLlUT6SuHD3jRKbxQxS6X5H5trzsSFQAH07fctf7_rh2C2iiSRp5br9ACtDXwYedWgz37y9ykqc0s9Ce0h5cmQqnQPVNpm0CfaaHa3b98f6V9t5Y1Pn0A0ChXtHCneswO_Hi-JE9MiA-_bFnIwgf3ryDtj7Q%3D)**

Thank you for your support on this serious issue.

Claudia
---
---
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
| PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_s=7d0c429a487b444e940bae59de5c2975&_t=8m1WgLdsTE_gCUXqDEI1ODOqq1ZPthI_jta6h3A0FnfaNVQRiJM6cQd_Rz0cpkEXqt7TNhClVMb5jsexm5xtHm6_DQub_iB-8ZDmHeMfd0vJxZUiUTk29AXlTzBfBTw2_c6sX68_N4uLmtDh1GaP8Z9tIkbrfXU9crmq-TIHwl4%3D) |

name: Kimberley Boggus
subject: INTERNAL MEMO: Admiral Mike's Path to Victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Here's an update on what's in store for the next three weeks; the objective is clear -- cross the finish line in first place.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello everyone on the Franken Crew. We are headed to the finish line in a full sprint. With just a few weeks to go, I circulated an internal team memo laying out our path to victory -- how we navigate the primary and beat Joni Ernst in November. The Admiral, the campaign staff, and our army of volunteers are all in this race to win it. So, here's an update on what's in store for the next three weeks; the objective is clear -- cross the finish line in first place. Thank you, -Kimberley P.S. Many of these campaign activities are only available to us because of your contributions. [_**So, if you can keep supporting us, please make a donation today so we can expand our efforts.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bb/33365068/4a72d20c/3f8bfa23/2611378029/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200507_em_fr_ptv_all_L1") | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bb/33365068/4a72d20c/3f8bfa3c/2611378029/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200507_em_fr_ptv_all_btn1")
---

* * *
From: Kimberley Boggus
To: Team Franken
Re: Path to Victory

**THE PATH TO VICTORY**
Admiral Mike is the strongest candidate to take on Joni Ernst this fall, by far. Our campaign is grounded in the lessons he learned growing up in Northwest Iowa and serving for nearly 40 years in the Navy.
We won't take any vote for granted, and voters (Democrats and Republicans) have noticed.
From the launch of our campaign, we've made it clear that we plan to reach voters throughout Iowa. We even held our launch event in rural Sioux County, the Admiral's ancestral home. When we had to file our nomination papers to get on the ballot, we had signatures from Democrats in all of Iowa's 99 counties and five times the number of needed signatures.
Our hard work is showing in the numbers.
The most recent poll from the _Des Moines Register_ showed that Admiral Mike is the strongest candidate in the primary and general election. He has a +14 favorability rating with Democrats - more than any other candidate. That means Democrats who know him believe the Admiral is the best candidate to flip Iowa in November.
[](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bb/33365068/4a72d20c/3f8bfa3d/2611378029/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200507_em_fr_ptv_all_img1")
**OUR CAMPAIGN IS BUILT TO WIN**
From the start of our campaign, we've prioritized building relationships with Iowans all throughout the state. That meant prioritizing the hard work of traveling and meeting voters in their homes and local coffee shops in every corner of Iowa - placing a premium on developing deep support from Iowans over big dollar donors.
**Our effort has only made us stronger during this national health emergency.**
We pivoted right away to staying in touch with voters online -- hosting daily virtual town halls so that voters throughout Iowa can interact with Admiral Mike and connect with him about the most important issues of the day.
[](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bb/33365068/4a72d20c/3f8bfa3e/2611378029/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200507_em_fr_ptv_all_img2")
And when national super PACs entered the race to try and tip the scales, we responded. We've been reaching Iowans online since February and were the first candidates to launch our TV ad in the primary. It hasn't been easy - but thanks to the support of our robust grassroots network we've been able to match outside entities on TV in Iowa's largest markets.
**MIKE FRANKEN IS THE CANDIDATE FOR THE MOMENT**
In times like these, we need leaders who know how to take a tough stand and lead in a time of crisis.
Admiral Mike's just the person to take the helm right now. When he was a junior officer at the table, in a room under pressure to justify an invasion of Iraq, Mike cast the lone vote against the disastrous invasion, a disastrous war, and a failed attempt at thrusting ourselves on a culture we did not understand.
He's built coalitions and led teams to battle some of our most challenging international crises. Admiral Mike led a 4,000 person command in Africa. He was involved in addressing the Ebola outbreak and has seen the impact of preparation on the containment of infectious diseases.
Most of all, right now, we need leaders who know how to get the job done and who'll put Iowans first. We can count on Admiral Mike Franken to lead from day one.
[](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bb/33365068/4a72d20c/3f8bfa3f/2611378029/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200507_em_fr_ptv_all_img3")
**THE BOTTOM LINE**
We have to defeat Joni Ernst in November, and Mike is the perfect candidate at the perfect time. A military commander, from rural Iowa, gifted with intellect, experience, empathy, and vision. He is the person for this time of turmoil -- to lead. He represents us, all Iowans. We've released our ad ([_**watch it here**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bb/33365068/4a72d20c/3f8bfa38/2611378029/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200507_em_fr_ptv_all_l2")), and we have a clear path to victory to make the Admiral our next Senator.
[](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bb/33365068/4a72d20c/3f8bfa39/2611378029/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200507_em_fr_ptv_all_img4")
Thank you,
Kimberley Boggus

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24bb/33365068/4a72d20c/3f8bfa3a/2611378029/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200507_em_fr_ptv_all_ftr")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Early voting starts this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Primary elections are still moving forward during the COVID-19 pandemic, with early voting beginning in less than a month. Click here >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469221?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2d0a90440b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republicans,

Early voting in this year’s primary begins later this month!

Indiana’s primary is scheduled for June 2. And whether you choose to vote by absentee mail-in ballot, vote early, or vote on Primary Day, it’s more important than ever to make your voice heard this election cycle.

We need to elect strong, principled, conservative Republicans to conintue leading Indiana through the public health crisis and get Hoosiers back to daily life and work safely.

The first thing you should do is visit Indianavoters.in.gov.

While you’re there, you can review your ballot and find your polling place. You can request an absentee ballot, or **vote early, in person starting May 26.**

If you’d like to vote absentee by mail, you must request your ballot by May 21.

**How to vote by mail in the Indiana primary:**
* Go to [IndianaVoters.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c1ca9fd891&e=1acd9bb3d6) and click “Vote By Mail or Traveling Board.”
* Click “Visit My Voter Portal,” and securely log in with your name, date of birth and county.
* On the left navigation bar, select “Absentee Voting,” and then click “Vote By Mail.”
* Complete the “Application for Absentee Ballot by Mail Only For 2020 Primary Election” form. Select a Republican ballot.
* Check that you authorize your signature to be added to the application, and the click “Submit Application.”
* You will get your absentee ballot in the mail.
* Fill out the ballot and return it to your county election division.

And, of course, you can always vote in person on June 2nd — Primary Day — by visiting your designated polling location.

If you have any questions, call your county election division and they can walk you through the process.

Don’t miss this important opportunity to vote!

\- Indiana Republican Party

P.S. Another exciting opportunity – working the polls, representing your party, and making a little money. Interested? Contact your county Republican Party chairman at [http://indiana.gop/counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e0bc526ccc&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---

Friend, we're running out of time, so I'll get right to it: **With just hours until our midnight deadline, we 're still falling 206 Election Year Members short of our goal. **
If we lose in Georgia, Democrats cannot take back the Senate. It's as simple as that. But my Republican opponent will spend whatever it takes to buy this seat. She's flooding this race with $20 million of her personal fortune, and she just launched a massive TV ad blitz attacking Democrats and propping up her campaign.
**Right now, polling shows this race is a dead heat. Whether or not we meet tonight 's goal - and build a grassroots team strong enough to topple the GOP's millions - could decide Senate control for the next two years. The only way we win is if people like you are by my side, all the way to November. That's why I'm personally asking you to become an official member of this people-powered team by chipping in what you can today.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Teachers like Marissa and Analisa
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This Teacher Appreciation Week, I'm saying thank you.
| **From the Desk of
Jay Inslee** Friend, So many of us were grateful to teachers before -- but now? Now, we're in awe. As parents and families have transitioned to being full-time caretakers, we're more thankful than ever for all our teachers do. It has never been easy, and many of us are learning for the first time just how hard the work really is. Take **Marissa Winmill** , an English Language Learners teacher at Kent-Meridian High School. She's making distance learning work in less than ideal circumstances by using video chat and securing hotspots for students who can't access the internet. We've long known the burden of school closures falls harder on marginalized communities like English Language Learners, but with teachers like Marissa, those students won't fail. She provides her students with regular daily schedules and meets online each day with them at the same time in the morning. The key to her success has been flexibility: She has been adjusting to students' new sleep schedules and sends emails and makes phone calls to keep up with them, while also working to provide a variety of forms and options for students who need different access points. Marissa will tell you it's hard, and she'd rather be in school with her students, but keeps fighting for them because that's what teachers do -- she's an inspiration to me and to so many others. **Analisa McCann** is another one of those teachers who is inspiring me and so many across the state and country. She's a first grade teacher who turned her heartbreak over leaving her classroom in March into hope for her 19 students. She's spent every day (including during spring break!) thinking and planning for success for her classroom. Her Instagram posts are filled with positivity, optimism, and ideas for parents and other teachers to make distance learning more successful. It's easy to get overwhelmed by this new way of educating and learning, but teachers like Analisa are embracing it, giving me hope for the days and weeks to come. This week, Teacher Appreciation Week, teachers can't get their usual hugs and praise from their students, but I wanted to say thank you. Thank you for providing world-class education to your students. Thank you for working long after you intended and so much harder than you thought. In a world where we're not sure what we can depend on, we know we can depend on you -- and more importantly, so can our kids. To the teachers in Washington state and the teachers across the country: Thank you. One million times, thank you. Very truly yours, Jay
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8055%2E868730%2EZWgGim). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump declares a National Day of Prayer
body:
“As our Nation heals, our Spirit has never been Stronger!” President Trump says. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01140bc568&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 7, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump declares a National Day of Prayer**

**“As our Nation heals** , our Spirit has never been Stronger!” [President Trump says](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a0bedc129&e=3ee4985eea).

**At the White House** today, the President joined Vice President Mike Pence, First Lady Melania Trump, and Second Lady Karen Pence in leading a National Day of Prayer. The President’s Proclamation explains why this Day of Prayer is especially meaningful:
| | _Today, as much as ever, our prayerful tradition continues as our Nation combats the coronavirus. During the past weeks and months, our heads have bowed at places outside of our typical houses of worship, whispering in silent solitude for God to renew our spirit and carry us through unforeseen and seemingly unbearable hardships. Even though we have been unable to gather together in fellowship with our church families, we are still connected through prayer and the calming reassurance that God will lead us through life’s many valleys._ |
---|---|---

**Americans of all faiths** have risen to this moment to help slow the spread of disease. Soon, our places of worship will be full once more. For now, we pray together for those who are sick, for those who lost loved ones, and for those working hard to keep us safe.

[Read President Trump’s Proclamation on the National Day of Prayer.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ddfab54dfb&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **Watch****:** **[Your faith and prayers are bringing America strength](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5c095ca143&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1258496084600672266")**
|
---
|
## **🎬****First Lady reflects on 2 years of ‘Be Best!’**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a2d71de5a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **In May 2018,** First Lady Melania Trump launched a major campaign to encourage America’s children to “be best” in their individual paths through life. In the 2 years since, she has traveled the globe spreading that message in schools, hospitals, and more.

**“On this second anniversary** of my Be Best initiative,” [she tweets](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa528a2575&e=3ee4985eea), “I am reminded that now, more than ever, we must continue to work together and champion the issues that face our children in order to strengthen, protect and provide them with a safe and more secure future.”

**The mission of Be Best** is imparting the values of kindness, compassion, and healthy living to our next generation. In particular, it focuses on the three pillars of childhood well-being, online and social media safety, and the scourge of opioid abuse.

**The** **First Lady** has carried that message far and wide, speaking to nearly 4,000 students across the globe. She’s joined in summits, met with governors and lawmakers, and toured nearly 20 hospitals to thank healthcare workers personally for their efforts.

**As a result** , Be Best has led to some incredible moments:

* 🎬 [Visiting Sarvodaya School in New Delhi, India](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b50248730f&e=3ee4985eea)

* 🍿 [Hosting movie night for students at the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e12d7a5cb8&e=3ee4985eea)

* 🎬 [Encouraging young people to get outside in Wyoming](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=903c6e7d1e&e=3ee4985eea)

* 🎄 [Reading a Christmas story at Children’s National Hospital](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e9568a76d&e=3ee4985eea)

* 🎬 [Taking the Be Best message to school children in Kenya](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8235a4d087&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Let us use** this unprecedented time as an opportunity to teach our children how to use this moment of uncertainty as a way to grow and learn,” the First Lady says.

[Learn more about the First Lady’s Be Best initiative.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16b4cb4801&e=3ee4985eea)

**MUST READ:** [“Melania Reflects on Anniversary of ‘Be Best’ Launch and the ‘Major’ Accomplishments Over Last Two Years”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ccf012ab5f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **A woman on horseback receives the first COVID-19 test at a mobile testing unit in Bandera, Texas**
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af46f2a426&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=71d0ca027e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6cf1ef05a3)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

Peter,China is a threat to our national security and the Chinese Communist Party is working to influence and control American institutions. Some of the mainstream media takes money from China by running "China Daily" advertisements paid for by the Chinese Communist Party.

And did you know that much of Hollywood is in China's pocket?
SIGN MY PETITION HERE: GET THE CCP OUT OF HOLLYWOOD http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTEzMjQS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDY2MzI2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTEzMjQS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDY2MzI2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Chinese companies have purchased stakes in American movie theaters and film production companies. China pressures these companies to censor movies in order to export the Chinese Communist Party's ideology.

Here are just three examples.The remake of Top Gun was censored because it included a Taiwan flag. When Red Dawn was remade in 2012, it originally featured Chinese soldiers attacking the U.S. but was changed to avoid offending Beijing.The zombie movie World War Z changed the location of the origin of the zombie outbreak from China to North Korea.I think enough is enough.

Do you agree? If so, sign my petition: it’s time to get the Chinese Communist Party out of Hollywood. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NTEzMjQS1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDY2MzI2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Hollywood shouldn't act as the propaganda arm of China. And if you agree, then let’s start fighting back.

Thank you for your continued support.

In service,

Tom

| BREAKING NEWS: TRUMP'S DOJ DROPS CASE AGAINST MICHAEL FLYNN
Here's the truth:
